title: Melissa the Hero/My Bunny Lies over the Ocean (song)/The Trouble with Larry
description: Melissa the Hero: Melissa brags about helping Petunia to the point of self-aggrandizement./The Trouble with Larry: Petunia invents an imaginary friend to help her always get her way.

title: Pajama Pajimjams
description: Oscar pretends to be a talking pair of pajamas named "Jimjams" to make his friend Pajamas happy.

title: The Birthday That Wasn't
description: Dibble misunderstands the Bears' intentions when they secretly make a plush toy Whiffle for her "Un-birthday." Thinking it's real and that the Bears love it more than they love her, she steals it and plans to leave it in the forest. She has second thoughts and returns her "rival" to her friends, only to learn that it's a gift to show their love for her.

title: Welcome to Zombozo-Zone!
description: During medieval times, Team Tennyson must fight to remember that they're not in the past at all, but actually at a Renaissance-esque faire, where "King Zombozo" has hypnotized its guests into thinking they live in the past!

title: Where the Magic Happens
description: Gwen takes the team to a dimension of magic, where their only hope of survival rests with her old foe Charmcaster.

title: Bengeance is Mine
description: Vilgax' former lackey Psyphon is elated when his master returns.

title: Let's Do the Time War Again
description: Ben, Skurd and Rook find themselves caught in an endless time loop as enemies from the future converge on Bellwood.

title: The Sacred
description: Iyanu, Biyi, Toye and Ekun reach The Source Mountain and meet the Guardians. Iyanu must pass the three Trials to prove she's the Chosen. Meanwhile, Chancellor Nuro, possessed by the Fallen One, tracks them across the Rinku Plains to stop her.

title: Za
description: Pizza's Diner needs a makeover. Apple and Onion better get this right or Pizza is ruined.

title: The Prince and the Squire-Off
description: Bert enters a prestigious Squire-Off tournament in order to prove himself worthy of being Prince Ivandoe's squire. His competitors are Toby (Prince Svan's squire); Maggie (Jezabel's squire); Gnaomi (a thinly disguised Sassy Gnome) and … Ducky! Bert's devotion to Prince Ivandoe eventually wins him the coveted Golden Grooming Brush. Unfortunately for Ivandoe, it also wins Bert his freedom…
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Falafel's in Jail
description: Falafel's in trouble with the law despite pleading his innocence. Apple and Onion vow to break him out.

title: Be Afraid of the Dark
description: Ben travels into space to thwart Ghostfreak's diabolical plans. But is he hero enough to take on the Mummy, Werewolf and Frankenstein?

title: The Betrayal
description: Elu descends into civil war as Biyi, Oba Adeyinka and Kanfo tell personal stories of past heartbreak. Iyanu, Toye, Ekun and Biyi struggle to reach The Source, while Olori continues her search for Iyanu.

title: Champion
description: Stuck with a problematic pet, Apple and Onion need to somehow find a way to get their lives back.

title: Inside Man
description: Ben and company rescue Tyler, a runaway prisoner of the DNAliens while trying to stop them from completing the Jump Gate.

title: Time and Time Again/Does Your Tongue Hang Low (song)/May the Best Taz Win
description: Time and Time Again: The babies learn the importance of telling time./May the Best Taz Win: Lola learns she can't be the best at every sport.

title: Keep Calm and Roll On
description: After Jestah's insults get the best of her, a short-tempered Bibi tries to not let the big-wheeled bully's words get to her so she can help Batgirl catch Harley.

title: For Queen and Country
description: Onion has an unexpected and impossible new love interest. Off to England then.

title: And Then There Was Ben
description: Professor Paradox unites the good Bens from across all dimensions to take on Vilgax, Eon, and the evil Bens in the ultimate showdown!

title: The Source Part II
description: Iyanu reaches The Source and faces a devastating choice about her destiny. As Elu teeters on the brink of destruction from the Corrupt, Iyanu's allies fight a final battle against Chancellor Nuro and the Fallen One.

title: Goodbye and Good Riddance
description: Summer's over and Ben is back at school. Unable to tell anyone that's he all these cool aliens that they've heard about all summer, Ben suddenly realizes he's gone from a "hero" to a "zero", that is until Vilgax comes after him with a vengeance. Ben must now reveal his hero side to his parents and to his fellow classmates. In doing so he saves his town and teams up with his dad to destroy Vilgax once and for all. But there is some bad news...Gwen has switched schools and is in Ben's class!

title: The Color of Monkey
description: Everybody's favorite alien conman, Argit, takes on a shady sidekick, Simian, in a shocking new business.

title: Flight Night
description: Batwing borrows a device that will allow the other Batwheels to fly like her! But if it falls into the wrong hands, it could spell trouble for Gotham.

title: Charm School
description: At Gwen's college, Ben suspects a new teacher and new student are old enemies.

title: House Guest
description: After injuring his leg, Greg comes to live with Steven and unintentionally interferes with Steven's powers.

title: Secret Garden
description: When Cyborg starts to rage out, Starfire takes him to her secret garden in the backyard to relax.

title: Haunted Campfire
description: The campers must battle ghosts of their own creation after their scary stories mysteriously come true.

title: Everybody Talks About the Weather
description: Gwen discovers Grandpa Max's Plumbers Badge emits a map showing the location of other Plumbers. Ben, Gwen and Kevin follow the map to nearby town and run into a heatblast. He helps the heroes discover that DNAliens have taken over the town and have erected a tower to control the weather. Ben must develop leadership skills to help a young hero save his hometown.

title: The Prince and the Blobby Princess
description: Princess Syllabob, the blobby daughter of Axalotly, King of the Deep, has been carried off by a gang of gulls and discarded on the forest floor. Prince Ivandoe and Bert happen upon her and agree to escort the Princess back to the lake before she dehydrates. Overcoming obstacles, including a swan-napping by Prince Svan, Ivandoe and Syllabob develop... well, a sort of... friendship?
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Blukic and Driba Go to Mr. Smoothy's
description: The Plumbers' resident geniuses, Blukic and Driba set off to find some smoothies meanwhile Ben and Rook try to stop Trombipulor from gaining the source of absolute power.

title: The Perfect Girlfriend
description: When Ben finds himself in an intense battle against Ssserpent, Julie steps in and helps him defeat the slimy brute.

title: Shhh!
description: While chilling at a monastery with a no-noise policy, Ben can't keep quiet and accidentally awakens a dangerous Dragon hidden in a secret chamber below the hallowed halls. A job that might be too much for even Diamondhead to handle.

title: Pet Project
description: Ben and company must rescue the shape-shifting, dog-like alien, Ship, from the Forever Knights.

title: The Library
description: The campers spend a rainy day at the library.

title: Out to Launch
description: While on a visit to Cape Canaveral, the Tennyson Trio are present for the inaugural launch of an experimental space plane. When Vilgax commandeers the ship, Ben must stop the baddie from weaponizing the shuttle before the countdown hits zero.

title: Moon Problems
description: The Moon gets sad when Oscar loses his friendship bracelet.

title: Past Aliens Present
description: After Ben stumbles upon a video of Cannonbolt ripping up a computer lab on the internet, Team Tennyson must race to State U to find the imposter; but once Ben discovers it is a steam-punk version of his alien that is terrorizing the campus, Ben must take down the man behind the machine, Steam Smythe!

title: The Job
description: Dad gets his first job as a pizza delivery guy, which rocks the very fabric of the universe.

title: Animo Farm
description: Ben stumbles into Dr. Animo's secret lab now ruled by his superior mutants, the Alphas, and must help the lesser animals escape while stuck as Stinkfly.

title: The Creature from the Chocolate Chip/The Looney Riddle (song)/Card Bored Box
description: Creature from the Chocolate Chip: Sylvester eats all of Granny's cookies then makes up a cookie monster to blame./Card Bored Box: Faced with nothing to do, the babies use a cardboard box and their imaginations to make playtime fun.

title: Clown College
description: While tailgating at a State U. homecoming football game, Ben teams up with Grandpa Max's old college buddies to keep the crazy clown Zombozo from robbing the stadium blind at halftime.

title: O Mother, Where Art Thou?
description: Ma Vreedle threatens to blow up the sun if Ben and the Plumbers don't find her missing son!

title: While You Were Away
description: Dr. Psychobos and Princess Attea have invaded Rook's home planet Revonnah with an army of Incurseans! (Introducing new Ben alien, Astrodactyl.)

title: Ultimate Aggregor
description: Aggregor's ultimate plan is revealed, and it's already too late to stop him!

title: Puff Paint
description: Oscar's painting is unpopular so he goes on a journey of self-discovery.

title: Tea & Basketball/Down by the Cage (song)/Taz You Like It
description: Tea & Basketball: Sylvester wants to play tea with the girls while Lola wants to play basketball with the boys./Taz You Like It: Taz discovers pratfalls get him laughs and attention.

title: Vilgax Must Croak
description: Ben and Rook escort Vilgax to a maximum-security prison planet, but the Incurseans have other plans. (Introducing Eighteight.)

title: Pajamas Party
description: When Pajamas starts to panic that Oscar will outgrow her, Oscar tries to help but things go awry.

title: The More Things Change Part 2
description: Ben and Rook discover an underground city beneath Bellwood populated with aliens! But who is terrorizing them? (Introducing Nemetrix alien BugLizard, & Ben alien Shocksquatch, Psyphon, Fistina, Bubblehelmet, Liam.)

title: Alone Together
description: Ben is transported to a distant planet alongside a Highbreed Commander. They must work together to get off the planet alive.

title: Oscar & His Demon
description: Oscar works to overcome his fear of crossing a very scary bridge.

title: The Prince and the Tears of Triumph
description: In an effort to impress Jezebel the thiefstress, Prince Ivandoe and Bert set off to find the elusive Centicore. For the Magic Tears of the Centicore are rumored to cure all known ailments. But how exactly does one make a massive mountain-goat, made from stone, blub?
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Space Race
description: Steven attempts to build a spaceship to let Pearl revisit the wonders of the cosmos.

title: Reststop Roustabout
description: With the Rustbucket stopped on the Midwest roadside, Ben locks himself inside with his tablet as Max and Gwen enjoy the great outdoors, until Team Tennyson is pulled into a wild Jack-a-Lope chase.

title: The Prince and the Feast of the Fopdoodles
description: Prince Ivandoe reluctantly accepts an invitation to a Royal MidSwanner Feast. "Reluctantly" because the invitation is from his nemesis, the awful Prince Svan of Svanland! As the feast progresses, it becomes increasingly clear that Prince Ivandoe, along with three rather peculiar guests, are the unwitting victims of a typically cruel Swan deception. Swans!!!!!!
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Director's Cut
description: Oscar receives a camcorder from his parents and sets out to prove to them the magic on the island is real.

title: Sneakerheads
description: Apple & Onion need a Last Will and Testament if they are to protect their belongings from the state.

title: Block Party
description: Apple and Onion have to outwit a mean duck who's taken over their building's roof.

title: Beast Boy's St. Patrick's Day Luck, and It's Bad
description: The Titans (except Beast Boy) are cursed on St. Patrick's Day and must travel to the end of the rainbow for the cure.

title: Fight at the Museum
description: Alien artifacts in Bellwood attract enemies from the future and friends from the past.

title: The Sound and the Furry
description: As Team Tennyson leaves the Frozen Man Festival, Lord Decibel takes center stage to threaten the festival-goers, creating an avalanche if his ransom isn't paid. An over matched Ben must step out of his comfort zone to save the festival from his noisy nemesis!

title: Catfight
description: The princesses Looma and Attea are at odds over who gets to marry Ben!

title: Stop and Smell Up the Flowers/Firehouse Frolics
description: Stop and Smell Up the Flowers: The Baby Looney Tunes explore a world of botanic wonder as they search for just the right spot to plant a young lemon tree./Firehouse Frolics: The Baby Looney Tunes tour the local fire station, learning fire prevention tips from friendly Fireman Frank. Later, Baby Daffy, the most reluctant and uninterested participant, displays the most fire-fighting knowledge when he is suddenly tested by a real-life emergency at Granny's house.

title: Time Traveling Quick Pants
description: Oscar and Hedgehog learn about a quicksand that lets them go back in time.

title: Need for Speed
description: Touring Yellowstone, Ben uncovers a plot by the fast & furious LaGrange to find treasure buried below the national park, but with a little help from Old Faithful, Overflow is able to douse LaGrange's dreams.

title: The Prince and the Yucky Duckling
description: A Hooded Stranger from Prince Ivandoe's past seeks revenge by attempting to ruin Ivandoe's perfect princely appearance. Bert repeatedly foils his attempts, so the Hooded Stranger kidnaps Bert and whisks him off to his lair. Time for Prince Ivandoe to rescue Bert and discover just what he did to anger the Hooded Stranger in the first place!
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Cosmic Bupkiss
description: A storm blocks Oscar and Hedgehog's one chance to see a comet.

title: Sidekicked to the Curb
description: When Bam is sent to take on Prank, Redbird is forced to hang back because The Joker's van is too dangerous! When Bam discovers that Redbird secretly tagged along, he's upset… until Redbird bails him out of a tight spot.

title: So Long, and Thanks for All the Smoothies
description: When Ben and Rook investigate a mysterious alien ghost ship, they discover that Argit and the Vreedle Brothers are fighting for possession of a doomsday device! (Introducing Solid Plugg.)

title: Brains TV
description: After a marathon of classic sitcom episodes, Clarence becomes stuck as alter-ego "Clarry," an obnoxiously overacting sitcom version of himself. It's up to his friends and family to help him snap out of it, or face life with a new Clarence.

title: Pancake's Bus Tour
description: Apple and Onion go on a guided bus tour as part of their plan to get Apple's shoe back.

title: Simple
description: When Ben arrives on a distant planet to try and help broker peace between warring factions, he ends up transforming into a new alien named Lodestar.

title: Vengeance of Vilgax Part 2
description: In the conclusion of this epic battle, Vilgax battles an array of Aliens and is close to ending Ben forever. But Diamondhead has different plans.

title: Mushrumours
description: Alice suffers the consequences of accidentally spreading a rumor about mushrooms.

title: The Galactic Enforcers
description: Ben joins a trio of intergalactic alien heroes tracking down the bounty hunter Six Six. But this bunch of heroes is not all it's cracked up to be.

title: The Krakken
description: While stopped at a lakefront campsite, Ben has a chance encounter with a Loch Ness type sea monster called a Krakken, controlled by an evil poacher.

title: The Vampire Strikes Back
description: Ben, Rook, and Rad Dudesman come face to face with the evil Lord Transyl, a vampire-like alien who can make anyone his loyal slave! (Introducing new Ben alien, Whampire.)

title: Omni-Tricked
description: Ben's vacation to Portland is cut short when he discovers an 11th alien while battling a Dr. Animo Mega-Creature. But when the fight leaves his Omnitrix on the fritz cycling through all 11 aliens, Max seeks help from an old friend to fix the Omnitrix as other dangerous forces seek it including a mysterious alien that's the same species as the 11th alien, Vilgax!

title: Basic Training
description: Ben and the crew are forced to go through basic training at the Plumber's Academy. And you can just imagine how well that goes.

title: A Small Problem
description: When Ben is not allowed on an attraction at a water park because he's too short, he decides to go alien to get even with the ride's attendant.

title: Party Popper
description: Apple and Onion's party plans are interrupted by a grumpy guest.

title: Omni-Copped
description: When Grandpa Max's engineer buddy Phil Billings gifts Team Tennyson the Omni-Copter, a state of the art flying vehicle that can transport the Rustbucket for overseas adventures, Steam Smythe takes to the skies to ground Ben and company's first test flight; but unbeknownst to our heroes, Smythe was sent to battle Ben's latest alien forms by a mysterious, powerful enemy: the Forever Knight.

title: Secrets
description: Grandpa Max's mysterious past comes to light when Vilgax shows up on earth in search of the Omnitrix. And the family must work together to defeat him.

title: Simian Says
description: An evil Highbreed queen takes over the Arachnachimp's home planet by attaching herself to a crime lord named Mizaru.

title: Island Adventure
description: Steven takes Lars and Sadie on a vacation to a magical beach to mend their friendship.

title: The Prince and the Heroic Hooded Hermit
description: When Prince Ivandoe gets trapped in the Burpy Bog, Bert asks the mysterious Hooded Hermit for help. But can Bert restore this once legendary hero's confidence in time to save his master from drowning?
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: The Show Must Hop On
description: Babs is excited to be the first student director of the annual toon showcase, but she quickly learns it won't be as easy as she thought. Meanwhile, with the help of his friends, Hamton learns to shine in the spotlight.

title: Solitary Alignment
description: Azmuth reveals how old George first got the sword and defeated Dagon, and the crew travels to the Middle Ages to learn the truth.

title: Wild Hearts Can't Be Caboodled
description: Things get wonky when Oscar and Hedgehog use magic to get an edge on their fellow campers in the Rainbow Unicorn Badge contest.

title: Have I Got a Deal for You
description: Ben and Rook must stop a giant rampaging alien from destroying Bellwood while dealing with a peace-loving alien-rights activist who doesn't want it hurt. (Introducing Hokestar, Solid Plugg 1st appearance, Pax, Sunder.)

title: Anywhere but Sumo
description: When Clarence realizes Sumo has made a new group of friends at his new school, he becomes jealous and confused. Will Clarence accept a school life void of Sumo, or scheme his way into making their friendship work?

title: Select Your Trek
description: Raven, Cyborg and Robin are zapped into a book and must rely on Beast Boy and Starfire to make the right selections to get out.

title: Patty's Law
description: If found guilty of breaking Patty's Law, Apple and Onion face grave punishment but they have a more pressing concern; looking after their dear, sickly Falafel.

title: Game Over
description: When Ben, as Upgrade, and Gwen get zapped into a Sumo Slammers video game, Ben soon has to deal with Gwen's superior gaming skills, while he also tries to impress his video icon in the game.

title: Hotdog's Movie Premiere
description: Apple and Onion square off against a no-nonsense security guard after they're banned from the premiere of their friend Hot Dog's new movie.

title: Yeti Confetti Chapter 1: Don't Tell Lucy
description: Oscar has to distract Lucy while the Yetis prepare a surprise for her.

title: Just Wait in the Car
description: As Mary runs errands, Clarence waits in the car and struggles to fight boredom.

title: Betterwheels
description: The Legion of Zoom wants to prove they're better than the Batwheels at doing good for Gotham, so they form their own super-team!

title: The Enemy of My Enemy
description: Argit infiltrates the Plumber's Academy with a plan to help the Vreedle Brothers do the last thing anyone would expect.

title: Secret Team
description: Steven, Amethyst and Pearl accidentally pop a bubbled gem and form Secret Team to secretly retrieve the missing shards.

title: Trash to Treasure
description: When David worries about how much trash is created by their lunch, Barney makes a game of Reducing, Reusing and Recycling. After making cleaning up fun, Barney inspires the whole community to contribute and care as much as the kids do.

title: Gilben's Different
description: Gilben's newly sprouted peach fuzz sparks a discussion about puberty that ultimately convinces Clarence to act more like an adult.

title: RC Car
description: Clarence spends a day outside with his toy RC Car, which he names Carla. Eventually convinced Carla has a mind of her own, he decides to follow her to new adventures. Will Clarence's car chase get in the way of Jeff and Sumo's plans for the day?

title: We'll Just Move the Stars
description: When an astrological mismatch threatens King and Puddle's wedding, Oscar and Hedgehog join them on a quest to ensure love conquers all.

title: Falafel's Glory
description: Apple and Onion must recruit the help of retired quiz master Falafel if they are to not starve.

title: The Walk of Death
description: With the Riverlands Settlement in ruins, Iyanu, Biyi, Toye and Ekun (TEAM CHOSEN) must cross the perilous Rinku Plains to find The Source -- the key to Iyanu's powers and lifting the Curse from Yorubaland -- while adjusting as a new team.

title: Vreedlemania
description: Pa Vreedle reunites with Ma for all-out destruction.

title: From Hedorium to Eternity
description: 11-year-old Ben, Gwen, and friends go on the adventure of a lifetime in their own backyard.

title: The Creature from Beyond
description: The Forever Knights accidentally unleash an evil force! And at a Bellwood retirement home, a retired Forever Knight suddenly gets a very bad feeling.

title: Absolute Power Part 1
description: Ben is infuriated when Gwen asks Darkstar for his help defeating the team's deadliest, and most unlikely foe of all.

title: The Sandman Is Coming/Ten Loonies in a Bed (song)/Some Assembly Required
description: The Sandman Is Coming: Daffy thinks the Sandman is a monster that throws sand in children's eyes./Some Assembly Required: Bugs gets a new toy with assembly required and has to learn to follow instructions.

title: Falafel's Passion
description: Apple and Onion try to help Falafel find his passion but it looks like things might take a humiliating turn.

title: Tips
description: Apple and Onion have to find a way to ride the Hot Air Balloon which is in their town for one day only.

title: Map of Infinity
description: Ben and his team travel to a bizarre half-frozen, half molten planet to prevent Aggregor from obtaining a priceless map.

title: Hole in 10
description: While mini-golfing, Ben is attacked by the Ground Hawgs, a gang of Dr. Animo mutants turned bikers. When the Hawgs realize the faux mini-golf village isn't an actual town, Ben must go alien to stop them before they set their sights on the real city down the road.

title: The Pizza Extravaganza
description: Nonna's chronic ankle injury puts her annual Pizza Extravaganza at risk of not happening. Vivie discovers that with the help and care of their community, she and Nonna will be able to manage anything!

title: Shock & AWW
description: When Courtney gets the old, gross daycare carpet replaced with a new one, the resulting static electricity has unexpected consequences.

title: Moor Fogg
description: Team Tennyson goes international in the Omni-Copter and the first stop is for a hike in the Scottish Highlands, but the weather isn't just bad, it's foggy, and that means one thing and one thing only: the return of The Fogg!

title: Monster Visit
description: The monsters get nervous when their Godmonster comes for a visit.

title: A Fistful of Brains
description: Grandpa Max and Rook are looking all over the galaxy for Ben, who is trapped on Khyber's hidden personal hunting preserve.

title: Twelve Angry Hedgehogs
description: Hedgehog wants to win the Golden Science Badge but runs into some unexpected competition.

title: Safari Sa'Bad
description: On their trip to Adrenaworld West, Ben takes a detour on a jungle cruise and finds himself hunted by the evil Tim Buktu. Our hero must outwit the baddie if he wants to make it off the amusement park ride alive!

title: Prisoner #775 Is Missing
description: When old George enters Area 51 and makes the entire base disappear, Ben and the crew learn that a mysterious Prisoner 775 may be behind it all.

title: Loose Change/Oh Where, Oh Where Has My Baby Martian Gone (song)/Act Your Age
description: Loose Change: Sylvester is upset when Granny paints the bedroom but he learns the importance of change./Act Your Age: The kids try to see who can act most like a baby, while vying for Granny's attention.

title: Mutiny for the Bounty
description: While Phil and Grandpa Max tune-up the Omni-Copter, a restless Ben takes the Rustbuggy off road, but when he is suddenly captured by Textrax and the hunter takes the bounty for himself, our hero must not only escape but avoid the wrath of the double-crossed Kraab and Sixsix!

title: The Reunion
description: Several weeks after cleansing The Corrupt, Iyanu discovers ancient technology reactivating across Yorubaland. Meanwhile, Adura, Queen of the People of the Deep, plans an invasion of Elu, while Toye reunites with Biyi to investigate mysterious glyphs.

title: The A-Bok-Bok-Bokalypse
description: When chicken pox sweeps through the school, the kids visit the Chicken Queen to apologize for past misdeeds and hopefully to procure an antidote, before it's too late!

title: The Prince and the Lonely Trollstress
description: Seeking shelter from a snowstorm, Prince Ivandoe and Bert find themselves trapped in the home of a Giant Trollstress. Bert is convinced they'll be gobbled up as part of a terrifying Troll-Feast. As it turns out, the reality is far worse! After a humiliating doll's dress-up session (during which Ivandoe becomes "Sugarplumps - The Beautiful Christmas Fairy") they are forced to join the Trollstress and her "guests" for a tense Christmas Dinner. They manage to escape but only after making sure that, for once, the misunderstood Trollstress also has herself a very merry Christmas.
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: The Prince and the Swoony Swanstress
description: Prince Ivandoe and Bert take a lovely, but lost and confused, Swanstress under their wing. When finally, her memory returns, it turns out she is none other than the awful Princess Svandelyne, stuck-up sister to Prince Svan - Prince Ivandoe's greatest nemesis! And when Svan turns up, well, this can only end up in a Prince-Off. And does!
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Con of Rath
description: Ben is on a special mission when the Omnitrix malfunctions and turns him into an Appoplexian named Rath who wants to fight anything that breaths.

title: Cat-Taz-Trophy/If You're Looney (song)/Duck! Monster! Duck!
description: Cat-Taz-Trophy: Sylvester and Taz team up to win a toy racecar derby./Duck! Monster! Duck!: Daffy reads the babies a scary story, only to end up frightening himself.

title: And Then There Were 10
description: Ben discovers the Omnitrix, and when it attaches itself to Ben's wrist, he discovers it allows him to become any one of ten alien heroes.

title: These Little Piggies Went to Market/Now Museum, Now You Don't
description: These Little Piggies Went to Market: Their first trip to a big grocery store fascinates the Baby Looney Tunes. After warning the others to stick to Granny's shopping list, Baby Bugs succumbs to buying a favorite treat then feels guilty./Now Museum, Now You Don't: Their very first trip to an art museum unleashes creative energy, turning the Baby Looney Tunes into enthused culture connoisseurs and budding artists. Baby Bugs recreates the museum experience back at Granny's house, finding abundant art history in everyday objects to the others' sheer delight.

title: Susie and Ramona Chapter 4: Witches in the City
description: Ramona sends Susie back to New York in search of new magical creatures.

title: The Flame Keepers' Circle
description: A fanatical group of whackos have taken to worshiping Vilgax of all people or aliens! And guess who has joined them, Julie!

title: Dr. Animo and the Mutant Ray
description: Dr. Animo has broken out of jail, and has been tracking down Ben, intent on revenge. At the same time, Ben's broken off a piece of the Omnitrix, and as a result, has turned into weird alien combinations, i.e. StinkArms.

title: Fame
description: Ben's secret identity is revealed to the world, and an alien refugee is about to detonate a nuclear bomb.

title: Flush Hour/Paws and Feathers (song)/I Strain
description: Flush Hour: The babies learn the purpose of toilets./I Strain: Petunia gets hooked on watching television and stops playing with her friends.

title: Zombozo-Land
description: Ben, Gwen and Max revisit their favorite amusement park, renovated and re-branded as AdrenaWORLD! Unfortunately, the new management is Zombozo and his trio of new henchmen! He's got a plan to hypnotize everyone in the park to form a criminal army. Ben has to set aside his desire to ride every ride in the park and make things right.

title: The Littlest Tweety/Over the Burrow (song)/In Bugs We Trust
description: The Littlest Tweety: Tweety is tired of being overlooked because of his diminutive size./In Bugs We Trust: Bugs uses the babies' money to buy different toys than he promised.

title: School Daze/Mary Had a Baby Duck (song)/Things That Go Bugs in the Night
description: School Daze: The babies play pretend school in preparation for the real thing./Things That Go Bugs in the Night: Bugs must find the courage to discover what's making scary noises outside.

title: Hark the Gerald Sings
description: Oscar confronts an age-old superstition.

title: Xingo
description: Ben is more interested in a marathon of his favorite cartoon show, "Xingo", but when Ben goes Upgrade to get a better signal, the titular Xingo leaps from his animated dimension to ours, bringing mad chaos with him!

title: The More Things Change Part 1
description: Now on his own, Ben sets out to be a solo superhero, with new alien heroes at his disposal, but Grandpa Max has other plans. (Introducing Rook, Malware, Khyber, Nemetrix alien Crabdozer, new Ben aliens Feedback & Blox, Pakmar.)

title: Catch a Falling Star
description: Movie starlet Jennifer Nocturne springs the evil Captain Nemesis out of jail and the two escape and soon, Ben and Gwen are hot on their trail.

title: Taz in Toyland/Born to Sing (song)/A Secret Tweet
description: Taz in Toyland: After Taz breaks all of his toys, Granny gives him one last chance to care for something./A Secret Tweet: The babies plan a surprise birthday party for Tweety.

title: The Prince and the Tickly Torment
description: Prince Ivandoe stumbles across a secret meeting of the Royal Society for the Punishment of Peasants. Upon discovery he's about to become the victim of Prince Svan's invention - the "Tushy Tickler". Can a disguised Jezebel rescue him in time?
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Weapon XI Part 2
description: The Rooters have seemingly turned Kevin and the Amalgam kids against Ben. Can Rook and Gwen help him overcome the opposition and escape the Null Void?

title: Charm School's Out
description: During a family cookout at a forest campsite, Charmcaster users her magic to switch places with Gwen, but when Ben catches "Charmcaster" sneaking about, he attacks, unaware it's actually his cursed cousin!

title: Who Said That?/Paws and Feathers (song)/Let Them Make Cake
description: Who Said That?: Daffy learns a bad word and must learn not to use it./Let Them Make Cake: Melissa wants cake, but she wants the other babies to bake it for her.

title: Pat on the Head
description: Apple and Onion are to cook for a very important guest but Onion is not quite feeling himself.

title: Animal Day
description: Clarence feels the call of the wild - and decides to live a new life, free of the hustle and bustle of the modern world. Recruiting a few friends, Clarence sets out to find a new place to live his feral life, but quickly realizes he lacks some basic survival skills.

title: Villain Time
description: Ben must go alien to save the Hoover Dam from disaster, but when tough guy hero Tim Buktu swoops in to help, Ben must figure out if Tim is friend or foe.

title: Waterfilter
description: Ben, Gwen, and Max's trip to Niagara Falls is cut short by the horrid Hydromanders, creatures menacing them and their fellow tourists.

title: Half-Sies
description: During a trip to the Lake of the Ozarks, Ben and Gwen squabble over Ben's unnecessary "half-birthday" celebration, but when Max gets word of a suspicious rockslide nearby, the cousins must put aside their differences if they are to rescue the trapped miners and uncover who is behind the manmade catastrophe before it's too late: the Bugg Brothers.

title: Darkstar Rising
description: Ben and co. must uncover the truth of a mysterious new villain, Darkstar.

title: Sunken Sub
description: In an effort to speed up their journey to Atlantis, Panda pilots a submarine.

title: Ben 24hrs
description: When Ben (and Gwen!) attempt to stay up all night for Adrenaland, the only theme park open 24/7, he not only fails to utilize his alien powers to stay awake, but his "sleep-alien-ing" causes disaster after disaster that Gwen must fix before things get way out of hand.

title: Petri
description: Apple and Onion must get back to their apartment to put the lid on their petri dish.

title: Max Out
description: Gwen's older brother, Ken, disappears and she gets Ben and Kevin to help her track him down. Their investigation leads them to find not only Ken but also another long-missing relative and a startling secret of the DNAliens. This discovery comes at a high cost as Ben is left with greater responsibilities than ever before.

title: All Work and No Play
description: Having finally saved up and aquired an expensive toy race track, Apple and Onion are faced with one problem- there is no time to play with it.

title: Sea Bunnies
description: Oscar discovers an underwater portal. His return ticket? An errand for Susie.

title: Double Hex
description: While bird watching at Pinnacles National Park, Gwen and Ben get into a competition of who can spot more birds first, but once a forest fire interrupts their fun, Team Tennyson must hurry if they are to save the bird population and discover who is behind the suspiciously growing fire: Hex!

title: Vote Zombozo!
description: When the Rustbucket must tune-up in the same town as Zombozo's latest campaign trail stop, Ben soon discovers the clown is using his speeches to hypnotize then rob the town, and Team Tennyson must stop the baddie from winning the election.

title: New Cat in Town/Baby Bunny (song)/The Magic of Spring
description: New Cat in Town: Sylvester is jealous of the attention baby Pepe is receiving./The Magic of Spring: Bugs' failure as a magician turns to success when he experiences the true magic of nature.

title: The Prince and the Golden Father
description: When Prince Ivandoe saves the life of a Wishapillar, he is granted a wish. Unfortunately, due to a poorly timed case of hiccups, instead of wishing for the Golden "Feather" Ivandoe actually wishes for a Golden "Father". And a particularly needy one, at that!
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Buggy Out
description: After winning a Sumo Slammers Champion belt, Ben returns to the Rustbucket to find his prize in the arms of Kevin, but when his rival hijacks the Rustbuggy instead, our hero must stop at nothing to get back what's rightfully his!

title: Brief Career of Lucky Girl
description: When a wizard cos player gets his hands on a real, magical wand at Comic Con, Ben enlists Gwen to help stop Hex from retrieving it by tricking the wicked warlock into thinking she is a powerful magic-wielder in her own right: the one and only Lucky Girl!

title: Jerk Chicken
description: In pursuit of the American Dream, Apple and Onion start their own business. However, a rather troublesome customer stands in their way.

title: 4 on 1
description: Onion's fear of crowds threatens his basketball team's success.

title: The Widening Gyre
description: After a giant garbage-like creature appears drags a boat down into the ocean, Ben and the crew investigate the Pacific Garbage Vortex.

title: Follow Your Dreams
description: Apple and Onion need to find a dream to follow, so that their lives don't head nowhere.

title: Yeti Confetti Chapter 4: Lucy's Instrument
description: Lucy goes to Yeti school to find her instrument.

title: Steam is the Word
description: In the heart of Silicon Valley, Ben has to stop Victorian villain Steam Smythe from securing an epic power source sealed in a Tesla time capsule.

title: Inspector #13
description: A mysterious Techadon Master visits Earth, looking for the Ultimatrix. And he turns out to be more dangerous than any Techadon ever imagined.

title: Space Invasion
description: A visit from Puddle the alien tests the limit of Oscar's hosting skills.

title: The Eggman Cometh
description: When vicious dragons invade Bellwood, it's up to Ben and an all-new alien named Jury Rigg to battle the flying demons and return the peace.

title: The Prince and the Fraudy Lord
description: When Prince Ivandoe rescues Lord Roderick, they quickly become firm friends. They've so much in common, and even look alike! But Bert is suspicious, especially when the map to Eagle Mountain goes missing…
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Last Laugh
description: Ben's fear of clowns emerges at an unfortunate time when our heroes stumble upon a wicked circus with a psychic vampire clown named Zomobozo.

title: Wise Quacker/D-A-F-F-Y (song)/Yours, Mine...and Mine, Mine!
description: Wise Quacker: Bugs gets laughs doing hurtful impressions of the other kids, but he takes the jokes too far./Yours, Mine...and Mine Mine Mine!: Daffy thinks if he shares his old toys, Granny will buy him all new toys.

title: Mayhem in Mascot
description: After their attempt to get a photo with every storefront mascot is foiled, Ben and Gwen sneak out at night to get their photo with the wooden bear totem known as "Yawk", only to find he and the other mascots have come to life!

title: Chadsgiving
description: Clarence is excited for Thanksgiving Dinner with Chad's parents, but Chad is worried that their unusually laid back demeanor and bizarre customs will make him look irresponsible by association.

title: Rotten Apple
description: Onion's Dad becomes convinced that Apple is a bad influence on his son.

title: The Later Pile
description: Hedgehog convinces Oscar to tackle an overdue errand -- but this time, Oscar's procrastination habit has spooky consequences.

title: Third Time's a Charm
description: Charmaster returns to exact her revenge on Gwendolyn once and for all.

title: Pepper's Blanket Is Missing
description: Pepper's blanket goes missing at a cabin sleepover.

title: Show Don't Tell
description: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max arrive at a Native American national park to witness the Ayasha Plinths, an ancient Stonehenge-like rock formation. But when the sinister sorcerer Hex arrives, Ben must battle against a beast Hex magically made out of huge rocks!

title: Puddle and the King Chapter 3: All the King's Slides
description: Oscar, Hedgehog and Puddle must figure out what's wrong with the King when he orders the aliens to turn all the planet's sugar into salt.

title: The Transmogrification of Eunice
description: The team discovers a strange alien girl with no memory but Sunder has been hired to capture her!

title: The Prince and the Wise Wizard of Wisdom
description: Struck down by a poisonous turnip, Prince Ivandoe & Bert must seek a cure from the Wise Wizard of Wisdom. They set off, and along the way, they are joined by an equally desperate small-faced bear, a bunny-dragon, and a truly useless fairy. Once they reach the Wise Wizard however, they discover that he is a lot less wise and a lot more "sassy" than anyone could have predicted!
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: The Ultimate Sacrifice
description: Ben is suddenly NOT Ben and it's an all-out revolt as the Aliens inside Ben's Ultimatrix demand their freedom.

title: Poles Apart
description: A trip to the South Pole goes upside down when Team Tennyson lands on the North Pole instead, but Ben quickly discovers the culprits: Solar & Polar Twain, magnetically-powered scientists who want to hold the world ransom by threatening to reverse Earth's magnetic poles!

title: OTTO Motives
description: Kevin and Rook run into an old enemy from the Null Void while attending an intergalactic auto show. (Re-introducing classic Ben alien, Upgrade.)

title: Ben Again and Again
description: After Billy Billions' efforts to carve his face onto Mount Rushmore with a laser are thwarted by Ben, the billionaire brat turns his focus on removing Ben from the Omnitrix, but once he accidentally rips open a rift in space-time, the two must carefully navigate another timeline if they are to return to the present.

title: Adventures in Babysitting
description: Ben, Gwen, and Max meet a family that appears to be a mirror image of them, but when Max goes off on a hike with their matriarch, Maxine, Ben is forced to babysit Simon Sez, a brat with a Billy Billions designed backpack  that turns him into a formidable robot.

title: Fuzzy Pink Time Babies
description: Oscar and Hedgehog learn how to stop time.

title: Present Tense/The Hare Hid Under the Fountain (song)/The Neat and the Sloppy
description: Present Tense: The Baby Looney Tunes pitch in to make an Arbor Day gift for Granny while Baby Lola, who suggested they do so, tries to make Granny a present on her own./The Neat and the Sloppy: A study in contrasts enlivens this odd couple's antics. Baby Daffy is the compulsive mess maker, and Baby Sylvester is the cleanliness freak.

title: Bruce Bunny/Baby Bunny (song)/Leader of the Pack
description: Bruce Bunny: When Daffy starts making up hurtful rhymes, Bugs changes his name to Bruce./Leader of the Pack: Daffy starts a secret password club for everyone except Bugs.

title: Baby Buktu
description: When attacked in the jungle, Team Tennyson is saved by a toddler who looks eerily similar to Tim Buktu, but when they discover it really is a pint sized version of the nefarious globetrotter, Ben knows there's another threat looming, Nanny Nightmare!

title: Recipe for Disaster
description: During Chefapalooza in the Rocky Mountains, three famous chefs and infamous bad-guys, The Tri-Chefta, hunt down Wildvine in hopes of creating their most exotic dish to date.

title: Tooned In Space
description: The toons take Marvin the Martian's class, and head to space. Buster tries to cheer up a homesick Babs, Plucky searches for a space outfit, and Sweetie is too obsessed with a video game to notice any of it - even when the aliens attack!

title: Permanent Retirement
description: Grandpa, Gwen and Ben visit an old maid relative only to find that her retirement community has been overtaken by a shapeshifting aliens called Limax.

title: All Koiled Up
description: When Ben grows impatient with the snail like pace of gardening, he goes O-E Overflow to pick up the pace and accidentally floods the community garden, but once a giant sink hole appears and frees King Koil and his Kimodo Dragon from below, Ben must quickly right his wrong and capture the baddies if he is to save the coastal city of Bayburgh.

title: The Inbetween
description: Apple and Onion have promised they will be there for Falafel's birthday party. However, they find themselves in a mysterious place and don't know how to get out.

title: Bend It Like Petunia/He'll Be Zoomin' Round the Mountain (song)/Cock-A-Doodle-Doo-It!
description: Bend It Like Petunia: The Baby Looney Tunes learn all about soccer from Floyd, who surprisingly is an enthused soccer expert. At first awkward, Baby Petunia works the hardest and displays the best sportsmanlike attitude, eventually becoming the very finest all-around soccer player of all the Baby Looney Tunes./Cock-A-Doodle Doo It!: On their first farm visit, the Baby Looney Tunes meet a young, dispirited rooster named Baby Foghorn Leghorn. They work together to build his self-confidence, unleashing powers of persuasion and elocution that even Foghorn never knew he had.

title: Appleoni
description: The wrong person is getting credit for a new dance craze.

title: Mop Forever
description: At Alice's dress-up party the campers are magically turned into their costumes.

title: A Jolt from the Past
description: Alien pests from Ben's youth come back, but now they need Ben's help. (Introducing Fistrick, & new Ben alien Gravattack.)

title: Grandpa Oink
description: The Looney Builders are hired by Petunia's Grandpa Oink to upgrade his farm. They take things too far and Grandpa Oink misses some of the things he loves most about farming.

title: It's Not Easy Being Gwen
description: You think it's easy being Gwen? Well you'll have second thoughts after you check out a typical day in the not-so-typical life of Gwen Tennyson.

title: Collect This
description: Ben finally meets the ones responsible for his intergalactic TV show, and the actor who makes Ben 10 more famous than Ben himself!

title: The Prince and the Legendary Rabbit Hood
description: Mistaking Prince Ivandoe for a lowly peasant, Rabbit Hood bestows upon him precious jewelry - that she has stolen from a Prince. Prince Svan to be precise! Who is none too pleased to discover his precious items in Ivandoe's possession! Ivandoe and Bert evade capture and set off on a quest to find Rabbit Hood. They must persuade her to return Svan's treasures, thereby clearing Ivandoe's princely name.
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Them's Fightin' Words!
description: After enjoying some local corn, Team Tennyson discovers a Hartfield-McJoy reenactment in the cornfield next door, but when Hex resurrects the ghosts of the real feuding families, Ben must find a way to bring them together if he is to save the day!

title: Gumbearable
description: After accidentally swallowing a piece of gum Owen has to protect his friends by jumping into gum volcano.

title: Trampoline
description: Mary buys a new trampoline for the family, but an accident lands her on the couch for a while. Determined to fight the boredom of being stuck indoors, she discovers her neighbor may be hiding something exciting.

title: Assault on Pancake Palace
description: When Gwen enters a pancake eating contest at the world famous Pancake Palace, Ben finds the Bugg Bros. and must stop them before they obtain an endless supply of what fuels their creations: Pancake Palace pancakes.

title: Just You and Me
description: The full moon finds Betsy withholding her big werewolf secret from Susie, who spends the night trying to figure out what her BFF is up to.

title: Story, Bored
description: During a book signing at a medieval castle, Ben must stop Hex from getting his hands on a grimoire that can fuse its user with mythical beasts, creating monstrous hybrids!

title: Time Heals
description: Gwen travels back in time to prevent the accident that turned Kevin into a monster from ever happening. But she ends up altering history forever.

title: Clyde Five
description: Ben's country cousin wants to be a hero, too.

title: Hare Ball
description: Marvin the Martian hires The Looney Builders to build an outer space ball court on Mars. Bugs is a big fan of the sport, and soon becomes a ball and build "hog."

title: The Prince and the Boasty Boar
description: In an attempt to win the hand of Princess Jezabel, Boaris Von Tusk stages a tournament to prove that he is the greatest warrior in all The Five Kingdoms. Prince Ivandoe takes part, of course, for no warrior is greater than he! But so too does a Masked Knight who not only wins but turns out to be... Jezebel herself! For Jezebel is nobody's prize!!!
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Computer Vampire
description: Oscar finds a mysterious old video game in the library.

title: Feeling Spacey
description: Oscar and Hedgehog arrive on a planet that has no emotions.

title: Pulling Your Weight
description: Apple and Onion join a gym to gain the strength of seven people.

title: Truth
description: An old Plumber partner of Max's resurfaces with nefarious intentions and ends up stealing the dangerous Null Void Projector.

title: Four by Four
description: During their visit to Twin City, Ben and Gwen sign up for some Laser Town awesomeness, but when Ben is teamed up with Kevin, the two must overcome their differences if they are to end up on top!

title: Missing Cat
description: When Chelsea accidentally lets her pet cat Crumbles out, the cat goes missing! Reluctant to ask for help, she struggles to find the cat before anyone realizes it's gone. It's up to cat whisperer Clarence to interject and find Crumbles, whether Chelsea wants his help or not!

title: Better Than You
description: The Squashinator challenges Craig to a battle he can't refuse.

title: No Honor Among Bros
description: Rook is under the influence of Fistrick's "bro" essence, and starts to act like a bro. Can he and Ben infiltrate an alien fight club to claim the Golden Fist? (Introducing Slix Vigma, alien promoter.)

title: Hall of Mooms
description: Hedgehog tries to get her broom back.

title: All Wet
description: No one believes Ben when he insists that one of the other patrons waiting in line at the World of Wet Water Park is the nefarious Frightwig disguised as a common girl. So Ben must prove his case while protecting park goers from her master plan: to destroy the park with its own water pressure!

title: Five More Short Graybles
description: Finn and Jake stick their thumbs in everything. Marceline tries to find her way to Wizard Bill's Music Shop. Ice King gets a new bride.

title: The First Day
description: Best friends Oscar and Hedgehog get dropped off at their first day at summer camp.

title: School District 9
description: When a career predicting machine tells Owen he has no skills to offer the world, Owen finds a way to prove the machine wrong in the most Owen way possible.

title: Malgax Attacks
description: Ben finally manages to rid himself of Skurd... just when he needs the Slime-Biot most.

title: Oscar and the Monsters Chapter 1: Unaccompanied Oscar
description: When Oscar isn't invited to Alexa's birthday party, Mortimer tries to make him feel better by telling him about a similar time in his life. Ever the glowworm, Oscar sneaks back in time to help a young Mortimer overcome the sad experience.

title: The Emily Ghost Institute for Manners and Magical Etiquette
description: Oscar and Hedgehog go to a magical etiquette class.

title: Apple's in Trouble
description: Apple is challenged to a fight by a grumpy Cheesesteak, so he and Onion go on a quest to find the source of Cheesesteak's grumpiness.

title: Susie and Ramona Chapter 1: Susie's Ark
description: When Susie learns magic is beginning to disappear from New York, she tries to lead all the magical creatures to safety.

title: Ben 10,000 Returns
description: Eon is back and it's up to an older and wiser Ben from the future to help the crew defeat him using the Hands of Armageddon to win the battle.

title: The Filth
description: Ben is tasked with cleaning the Rust Bucket. But when he is tricked into letting the villainous and vile Fly Guys steal it, he must chase them down before they create an unstoppable maggot monster with sights firmly set on destroying Las Vegas.

title: Rath of Con
description: Back stateside, Ben can't get into a cat cosplay competition, Top Tail, without a costume of his own; but when he goes Rath, a new cat-like alien with an attitude, Ben's newfound wild side quickly becomes much more than he bargained for.

title: Ben 10 Returns Part 1
description: Ben Tennyson is a normal teenager who has put away his toys including the Omnitrix that gave him his powers. Ben's life take a turn when he is attacked by an alien and discovers Grandpa Max is missing. To find his grandpa, Ben teams up with his cousin, Gwen, his grandpa's partner, Magister, and even his former nemesis, Kevin 11. When they discover the Forever Knights (a secret organization that deals in illegal alien technology) and DNAliens (the Highbreeds henchmen) are trading dangerous weapons, Ben decides to once again put on the Omnitrix and quickly learns he can now transform into ten new aliens.

title: Pepper and the Fog
description: After the island gets covered in fog, Pepper attempts to make it to Susie's house.

title: Mud Is Thicker Than Water
description: Ben, Gwen and Cousin Lucy try to find out how Psyphon's thugs are getting Plumber technology.

title: Jake the Dad
description: Jake's a daddy, but being a father and keeping his rainicorn pups from killing themselves or each other is a lot harder than he imagined.

title: If All Else Fails
description: A hibernating Highbreed officer awakens and triggers a device designed to destroy the planet. Now Ben must figure out a way to stop him.

title: The Dream Team
description: Craig and his cousin, Bryson, join forces for an action packed weekend at their grandparents house.

title: Birds of a Feather
description: Ben and company help the prince of the arachna-chimps, Simian, return to power.

title: Bright Lights, Black Hearts
description: Ben, Gwen, and Max stop by the graveyard set of Gwen's favorite TV show, The Unalivers, but when Ben discovers its lead, Michael Morningstar, is an energy vampire he goes alien to show the world the real star of the show: Heatblast.

title: Oldies and Goodies
description: Pop stars and performers start to go missing in Singapore, and Toby has been nabbed along with them! The spies embark on an old-fashioned country cruise disguised as a girl group to save them - which forces Sam to face her stage fright.

title: Voided
description: Ben goes into the Null Void to aid the Plumber's Helpers defeat D'Void.

title: Up a Tree
description: Finn and Jake are playing catch when Finn accidentally tosses their throwing disc into a gigantic tree.

title: For a Few Brains More
description: Ben, Rook and Max must stop Ultimate Albedo from absorbing Azmuth's intelligence and taking over the galaxy.

title: Betsy and Ghost Chapter 3: There's A Racket In My Hope Chest
description: The witches search for Betsy - who doesn't want to be found. Can she learn to love being a witch as much as she loves being a ghost?

title: Duped
description: Under pressure from his newfound fame, Ben comes up with a plan to be at more than one place at a time.

title: Perplexahedron
description: Ben, Kevin and Gwen race Aggregor through a mysterious artificial planetoid designed to destroy anyone who enters.

title: Susie and Ramona Chapter 2: Ghost Baby Jabberwock
description: Susie, Ramona, and Barb team up in frozen time to see what's threatening magic.

title: The Prince and the Birthday Bluesies
description: When Prince Ivandoe gets a case of the "Birthday Bluesies", Bert is determined to throw him a Stag Kingdom party with all of his favorite treats. Meanwhile an increasingly "sophisticated" Ivandoe becomes curious to discover the grown-up world.
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Glow Worm
description: While Hedgehog is off "werewolfing," a deflated Oscar has a therapy session with Shark that helps him realize the magic within him.

title: Ye Olde Laser Duel
description: As team Tennyson admires the efficiency of a super modern train station, Ben is quick to sniff out one of Steam Smythe's robots holding up the line. Once the fed up villain tricks our hero into accepting a duel, the fate of the Omnitrix hangs in the balance and it's up to Ben to set things right.

title: The Purge
description: The Forever Knights factions have been united into one and an all-out war against the aliens on Earth erupts.

title: The 11th Alien
description: Ben must overcome his doubts and fully embrace his new powers if he is to beat Vilgax and the Weatherheads.

title: Popular Banana Split
description: Hedgehog and Max discover a tiny high school when they are accidentally shrunk by a science experiment.

title: Merry Christmas
description: When the Rustbucket's A/C goes on the fritz in the middle of the desert, Ben, Max and Gwen take refuge at Holiday Village, an over the top Christmas theme park that seems to appear out of nowhere. The place is run by an evil entity known as Mr. Jingles, who takes Max prisoner because he believes Max is Santa! It's up to Ben and Gwen to free Max and break the spell Mr. Jingles has cast on Holiday Village, freeing others who've been trapped their for years and releasing the theme park.

title: A Pastime for Petunia/Looney Tunes Zoo (song)/Pouting Match
description: A Pastime for Petunia: Petunia has a difficult time finding a hobby that doesn't imitate the other babies' interests./Pouting Match: Lola tries pouting to get what she wants, and soon all the babies are doing it.

title: Tub on the Run
description: While Hedgehog and Max scour the island in search of a missing tub, everyone is dying to know: are things weird between them?

title: Franken-Fight
description: Ben hops into the Rustbuggy for a driving lesson along the sand dunes of Cape Cod, but he takes a freaky switchback turn when the Rustbuggy is mutated into a motor-monster by Bootleg, another alien transformation of Kevin 11, with powers similar to Upgrade!

title: Ken 10
description: We're back in the future with Ben 10K, and this time he has a son, Ken. On Ken's tenth birthday, Ben gives him his very own Omnitrix. Ben must come to learn to trust Ken with the power of the Omnitrix. Along the way, Ken befriends a kid named Devlin. Devlin turns out to be Kevin 11's son and was merely using Ken so he could break his dad out of the Null Void. Ben 10K and Ken then team up to take down Kevin 11. As for Devlin, he comes to realize his dad is a jerk, and realizes the error of his ways. He's able to redeem himself, proving he's a good kid and joining forces with "Team Tennyson."

title: A New Dawn
description: The Time War brings Ben, Rook, and George Washington together to battle an alien conqueror.

title: Win It or Bin It
description: Apple and Onion are about to take ownership of a brand new luxury penthouse apartment and be rid of their roof shack for ever! All they need is a good reference from a previous landlord… Falafel.

title: A Wish-Full Reunion
description: Mysterious flying hearts appear in Care-A-Lot and bring Wish Bear to the Silver Lining. She joins the Care Bears on a mission to bring a mystical mother bird's missing baby chicks home, and give a new home to an orphan bird.

title: Officer Moody
description: Pieces of Mr. Reese's past are revealed when his old partner on the police force, Officer Moody, visits Aberdale Elementary.

title: The Beast Inside
description: Ben, Gwen and Max make a return to Max's alma mater but this time it's no homecoming. Dr. Animo has made a scary transformation and found a way to release the very dangerous animal nature of humans, including Max's life-long friend!

title: The Enemy of My Frenemy
description: Gwen hopes to rescue Charmcaster. When she asks Hex to join her, he refuses saying he won't join a suicide mission.

title: Three Cheers for Cheer
description: When hard-working Cheer exhausts her crew running a string of drills to protect a Whiffle orchard from possible emergencies, Share's belly badge accidentally creates two Cheer duplicates. Cheer takes a recreation break, unaware that her clones are working Share and the crew - who think they're the real Cheer - even harder.

title: The Final Countdown
description: Rook and his little Plumbers must defend the Base from a mysterious lockdown.

title: Riding the Storm Out
description: Ben and Gwen's camping trip is interrupted by the emotionless Weatherheads (Gust-o, Hail-o, & Shock-o) but a malfunctioning Omnitrix firing out a mishmash of aliens may not be the forecast for success.

title: Etiquette Clarence
description: Clarence submits a short story into a creative writing contest, and he's overjoyed when he learns he's accepted as a finalist! But when Jeff finds out Clarence has to attend a formal dinner, he fixates on transforming the messy Clarence into a proper gentleman.

title: Susie and her Sister Chapter 2: Hot Corn Girls
description: On her 15th birthday, Susie must prepare for her Gibbous Rite Ceremony. Will Mildred be able to keep her chaotic magic in check for just one day so Susie can become the full witch woman of her dreams?

title: Gotham, We Have a Problem
description: When Badcomputer activates his own satellite and takes control of every computer on Earth, the Batwheels must launch into space to stop him!

title: Ben 4 Good Buddy
description: Out on a desert highway, a group of modern day highway pirates hijack the Rustbucket, trick it out and use it in a daring robbery. And while Ben and Gwen are at first glad to get rid of that "bucket of bolts", they come to realize the Rustbucket is "a part of the family." In the end our trio heroes get Max's beloved "ride" back and bring down these pirates once and for all.

title: Max's Monster
description: Grandpa Max's old Plumber partner, Phil, seeks Max's help to tame the monster within. (Introducing new Ben alien, Buzzshock; Re-introducing old Ben alien, Benvicktor.)

title: Dog King Clarence
description: When Clarence's neighbor Gale recruits him to dog sit for her, he knows it will be a breeze, being the self-proclaimed "Dog King," Clarence knows all there is to know about pups. Nevertheless, Gale's dog proves to be a little more challenging than he expects!

title: Positive Attitude Theory
description: Apple and Onion spend a day in Falafel's shoes and use their positive attitude to prove he shouldn't be so grumpy.

title: Billy Bajillions
description: In Aspen, Colorado, Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max are on a hike to find the Forgeti, but when they realize they've stumbled upon Billy Billions own "Winter in July" ski resort, Ben must battle Billy, with an assist from the Forgeti itself.

title: In Charm's Way
description: Kevin is charmed by a beautiful girl and finds himself under her spell (literally) as Charmcaster has returned and is forcing Kevin to do her biding.

title: Baby Bears on a Plane
description: The Baby Bears have an adventure in the sky while aboard a plane to Sweden. But when the baby Bears are forced to sit in different sections of the plan, things get a bit haywire for everyone on board.

title: Fear the Fogg
description: As Max attempts to get Ben and Gwen to the Four Corners Monument before sunset, an ominous fog bank engulfs the roadway and forces Max to drive at a snails pace, but once The Fogg comes to life and attacks the Rust Bucket, Team Tennyson must work together if they are to navigate to safety.

title: The Yolk's on You/Baby Elmer Had a Friend (song)/Baby-Gate
description: The Yolk's on You: Daffy and Melissa team up to play jokes on the other babies./Baby Gate: Melissa spreads rumors about the babies, and Bugs goes undercover to find the truth.

title: Chocolate Money Badgers
description: Oscar learns that he can earn merit badges that unlock prizes.

title: Super-Villain Team-Up
description: After a lull in alien antics, a restless Ben suggests to Max and Gwen that he might be a better hero if he went solo, but once Vilgax enlists the help of Zombozo to build a giant hypno-mechanism to hypnotize the entire world, Ben must rethink his strategy if he is to defeat the super-villain team-up.

title: Spin Out/Taz's Fridge (song)/Snow Day
description: Spinout: Taz learns a tough lesson. He shouldn't spin after eating too much candy./Snow Day: The babies experience their first snowfall.

title: Vengeance of Vilgax Part 1
description: Armed with the power of 10 Alien Champions, Vilgax sets his sites on Earth. And the only hero standing in his way Is Ben Tennyson.

title: Drone On
description: Ben and Gwen are in a highly competitive paper airplane war, but when alien-tech drones bombard the Rustbucket, the cousins must work together to ground the aerial attack and find out who's behind it: the alien conqueror, Vilgax!

title: Bibi's Do-Over
description: Everyone is ecstatic when Bibi, Batgirl, and Robin capture Toyman and his Do-Over remote - except for Bibi, who failed to stick the landing on a big jump. Unwilling to accept her failure, Bibi uses Toyman's Do-Over remote until she perfects her jump!

title: An American Benwolf in London
description: Ben and Rook are called to London England to investigate the Forever Knights' latest activities.

title: Grounded
description: Ben and Gwen manage to get grounded, leaving Kevin alone to fight the DNAliens.

title: The Prince and the Kissy Curse
description: An arrogant little frogman needs the help of Prince Ivandoe to lift his curse and become the big, beautiful bullfrog he once was. Due to a technical error, Prince Ivandoe's arms have been magically replaced by slimy froggy ones. So he has no choice but to help lift the curse in order to restore his princely arms. The Frogman's hopeless attempts to find a True Love's kiss end in failure. So Ivandoe and Bert convince him that his only hope is to earn the forgiveness of The Batwitch - his ex-girlfriend - who was responsible for cursing him in the first place.
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Bam's Upgrade
description: Feeling neglected after being passed over on missions, Bam asks MOE to install experimental upgrades to curry Batman's favor. But, when Bam's new powers are stronger than he can control, Batman - and the mission - are suddenly in danger!

title: Of Predators and Prey Part 2
description: While trapped in Khyber's ship, Ben learns details about the origin of the Nemetrix, and the link between Khyber, Malware, and Dr. Psychobos! (Introducing new Nemetrix alien Tyrannopede.)

title: Tumble Dry Low
description: When Hedgehog's podcast blows up, she must decide whether to ride the wave of fame or stay true to her small but loyal fan base.

title: Glitterspy
description: There's a new villain in town but he's not after the Spies. He's after Glitterstar, believing she's hiding a giant pearl. As the Spies try to protect their friend, they get trapped and it's up to Toby and Glitterstar to save them and find the jewel.

title: Arrested Development
description: Ben and Rook must stop the evil Robots from Dimension 12 while trapped in their own pre-pubescent bodies, thanks to Ben's childhood rival.  (Introducing Billy Billions.)

title: Drive You Crazy
description: After the Rust Bucket breaks down at a Mobile Home Park, Ben discovers they've stumbled on to the last leg of the Cali 10 Hundred, an epic, off-road auto race where mad driver Le Grange has returned for revenge against those that disqualified him years ago.

title: Honeydew Hatch
description: Oscar and Hedgehog enter Frozen Time to help Ramona grow time babies, but Ramona and Susie's broken friendship causes problems.

title: The Final Battle Part 1
description: Albedo Ben has stolen the Ultimatrix from Azmuth and has used it to kidnap Gwen and Kevin. So Ben goes to face Albedo Ben and rescue his friends.

title: The Dolly Vanishes/Vive Le Pew, Le Skunk (song)/Duck's Reflucks
description: The Dolly Vanishes: On an overnight train trip to visit Floyd at college, Lola's doll vanishes. Baby Bugs acts as a detective as he tries to solve the missing Edna mystery via a series of simple flashbacks, seen from each Baby Looney Tunes' point of view./Duck's Reflucks: Baby Daffy has Baby Bugs right where he wants him, as the subject of his digital photography and at the mercy of his endless, egocentric creative whims.

title: The Prince and the Sing-Songy Stag
description: When Prince Ivandoe valiantly sets free Brian the Bard, he discovers he is now stuck with him... until such time that Brian saves Prince Ivandoe's life in return. This would not be so awful if Brian didn't send all day singing accurate, yet deeply unflattering, songs about Prince Ivandoe's looks and abilities.
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Ice to Beat You
description: A chilling challenge inside an iceberg leads to the coldest elimination of the season.

title: Bridge Out
description: After an overpass collapses on the highway, Team Tennyson is in a traffic jam along with Simon Sez and family. But when Ben and Simon team up to tackle the gridlock together, Simon only makes matters much, much worse.

title: The Prince and the Nutty Wedding
description: When Prince Ivandoe triumphantly finds the One True Acorn during a rigged royal contest, he also finds himself betrothed to the psychotic Princess Sprinklejoy of the Red Squirrel Kingdom. Whilst narrowly managing to avoid a royal wedding, both Ivandoe & Bert end up in the Pit of Ow instead…which, all things considered, is actually preferable.
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: The Soundhouse
description: Oscar and Hedgehog discover a new structure on the island and become friends with its caretaker.

title: Moonstruck
description: Grandpa Max reveals the story of how he met Verdona and how he eventually was recruited to become a Plumber.

title: Fire & Ice
description: Kelsey and Stacks write a story for book club, which turns out to be more personal than Kelsey realized.

title: Perfect Day
description: Ben thinks he's having 'the perfect day' only to realize he's been put in a dream world by Enoch and the Forever Knights who are after the Omnitrix. Ben's "dream world" soon becomes a nightmare world, with Ben forced to live out his ultimate terror...being stuck at school! But with Max and Gwen's help, he's able to vanquish his nightmare foes and re-enter the real world where he takes down  Enoch...only to reveal an even more powerful knight...The Forever King.

title: All the Little People
description: Magic Man secretly slips Finn a bag filled with miniature versions of Finn and all his friends.

title: Reflected Glory
description: JT and Cash get in over their heads when they take credit for Ben's heroic acts.

title: The Secret of Dos Santos
description: Ben and Rook join Kai Green on a perilous alien relic hunt through South America.

title: End of an Era
description: The Time War races towards its dramatic conclusion, with the fate of the entire universe and everything in it since the very beginning of time resting in the hands of the Ben 10.

title: Takers Keepers/D-A-F-F-Y (song)/To Tell the Tooth
description: Takers Keepers: Daffy steals Taz's favorite toy but he learns you can't just take everything you want./To Tell the Tooth: When Bugs loses a baby tooth, Daffy tries to figure out how to scam the tooth fairy.

title: Nor Iron Bars a Cage
description: To settle an old score, Kevin voluntarily returns to the Null Void prison he once escaped.

title: Truffle Season
description: It's Truffle Season, Apple and Onion are Truffle Hunters and they will stop at nothing to taste a truffle.

title: Universe vs. Tennyson
description: Ben gets dragged into intergalactic court by the other Celestialsapiens (Alien Xs) for recreating the universe (back in "So Long and Thanks for All the Smoothies").

title: Tortilla Towel
description: After making Oscar's tortilla towel dreams come true, he and Hedgehog find that running a business is harder than they thought.

title: I Heart Heartforde
description: Oscar, hedgehog and the other campers are excited to take a trip to the non-magical town of Heartforde.

title: Campers Above the Bed
description: Hedgehog finds a city underneath her bed as she looks for her missing diary.

title: Showdown Part 2
description: Ben must deal with a past failure while a deranged Malware launches his final attack on Azmuth.

title: Ghost Town
description: Vilgax visits Ghostfreak in prison and gets more than he bargained for when Ghostfreak begins possessing the citizens of Vilgaxia.

title: For Whom the Toll Calls/John Jacob Jongle Elmer Fudd (song)/Cereal Boxing
description: For Whom the Toll Calls: Petunia and Tweety learn how to call long distance and amass a huge phone bill./Cereal Boxing: The kids become obsessed with getting the prizes from boxes of sugary cereal.

title: Good Job
description: Falafel is starting to feel very underappreciated as the building's handyman. What's the point in all this back breaking work if not a single person will ever tell him, "Good Job"?

title: King Koil
description: Ben and Gwen spend the day volunteering at Repto Ranch and come face to face with King Koil, but need to quickly overcome their fear of snakes if they are to rescue the released critters and defeat the slithery baddie.

title: And Then There Were None
description: Vilgax and Eon team up to wipe out every Ben in every dimension!

title: Bounty Ball
description: While Gwen listens to a lecture on the Transcontinental Railroad, Ben sneaks away to the gift shop. But once the Bounty Hunters appear and corner our hero, Gwen must relay the information she learned on the train and use it to their advantage to help Ben escape.

title: Jeremiah
description: Oscar finds and cares for a magical root from Susie's yard.

title: Beach Heads
description: After traveling to Tampa Beach, Florida, Team Tennyson hopes to get some much-needed rest & relaxation, but the tempests without a temper, the Weatherheads, have other plans that Ben must thwart: to build a new beach base!

title: Back on Board
description: Mel loses her confidence in skateboarding after a fall. Barney takes the kids on a trip on a high-seas adventure, where a stormy sea presents challenges that help Mel discover what she needs to feel safe trying new things again.

title: Elseworlds
description: When the Titans are banished to Elseworlds, they try to find a way back to the main DC timeline.

title: Xingo's Back
description: Left to entertain himself as Max takes a much deserved nap, Ben stumbles upon a Xingo arcade game and goes OE-Shock Rock to power it up, but when it receives too much juice, Xingo leaps out into the real world and our hero must go toe-to-toe with his favorite cartoon character.

title: Night of the Living Nightmare
description: Albedo is desperate to get his hands on the Ultimatrix and he goes to extreme measures to get it. Once he has invaded Ben's mind, all bets are off.

title: Benwolf
description: In New Mexico, Max stops to visit an old friend, who's a Navajo Chief. Suddenly, a powerful storm comes out of nowhere. And behind bolts of purple lightning, a Navajo werewolf appears. As Ben battles the werewolf, he appears to be bitten and turns into Benwolf.

title: The Badge of Courage
description: When Dibble dresses up as a superhero complete with a pretend belly badge, the Whiffles think she's the real thing and need her to confront an imaginary monster that they believe lives in a cave. She bravely enters the cave but loses her courage when she loses the belly badge, until Funshine convinces her that her bravery came from inside her.

title: Something I Ate
description: Ben, Gwen, and Max go on a tour of the impervious Fort Knox, but when Dr. Animo sicks a hungry ani-mutate on the Fort, Ben must stop it before it gobbles up the nation's monitory standard!

title: Return to Forever
description: The Forever Knights threaten to use a sinister weapon to erase all alien DNA on Earth unless Ben and Rook can stop them.

title: The Forge of Creation
description: Professor Paradox holds the key to stopping Aggregor from tapping into the limitless power of Alien X.

title: Return to the Sea
description: The bears catch up with their old chum Farah who teaches them about the dangers of the ocean.

title: Many Happy Returns
description: Gwen and Kevin pay Ben a surprise visit, but does Kevin's strange behavior have anything to do with an angry Tetramand princess, or her father's fleet of warships prepared to attack the Earth?

title: The Offer
description: Uwa returns to Elu to warn Kanfo of a potential invasion by the People of the Deep. Meanwhile, Team Chosen journeys to the source of the energy wave, but Biyi grows frustrated over his lack of mastery over the Beads of Elements.

title: Drone Shoes
description: Can there exist such a thing as drone shoes? It sounds like they would need a huge power capacity.

title: One Hit Wonder
description: Apple & Onion can't bear to work another day in their dead end jobs at the dollar store but as always, money is the issue. If only there was a way they didn't have to worry about money any more.

title: Shark!
description: Get your motors running, well, maybe not motors, but fins! Grizz heads out on the undersea highway when he befriends a sputtering, high octane shark. But it's not such an easy ride for Grizz once he finds himself in the race of a lifetime!

title: Locked in Space
description: When the spies are framed and sent to Space Jail, they must escape back to Earth to prove their innocence. But they unknowingly bring back an evil stowaway who can conjure up thunder and lightning, causing a major storm for WOOHP.

title: Gwen 10
description: Gwen gets her hands on the Omnitrix and all its powers and now Ben has to take a backseat as Gwen 10 battles Vilgax for control of the device.

title: Dungeon Doug
description: On a trip into the world of Dungeon Doug, Oscar and his dad find themselves on a father-son bonding mission.

title: In Search of Lore
description: Craig searches for more clues to aid his quest for the Heart of the Forest.

title: Tough Luck
description: Gwen's Lucky Girl powers return when she buys a magical stone at a magic convention in Las Vegas. However, Hex is after the same stone, and after his niece breaks him out of prison, the two set off to retrieve the stone.

title: Ice Cream Headache
description: The campers get magical powers from the witches supply of magic ice cream.

title: Something Zombozo This Way Comes
description: Ben and Rook must stop Zombozo and the Circus Freaks from turning everyone in Bellwood into zombie clowns!

title: Lil Noodle
description: Apple and Onion must remain legit enough to be in their favorite rapper's music video.

title: Rook Tales
