description: Rook's former teacher will preserve Revonnahgander traditions at any cost.

title: Never Say Try/Taz's Fridge (song)/Pair O' Dice Lost
description: Never Say Try: Sylvester is a bad dancer and finger painter so he believes he'll never be good at anything./Pair O' Dice Lost: Daffy feels defeated whenever things aren't going his way.

title: Chicken Nuggets of Wisdom
description: When Ben and Max get into an argument, Ben goes Heatblast to blow off steam against Max's wishes; but once Dr. Animo spots him and subsequently turns Max into a chicken, it's up to Ben to right his wrong if he is to save his Grandpa and stop Dr. Animo.

title: Trade-Off!
description: Darkstar, convinces Kevin to join him in a quest for an ancient artifact with the ability to help them both escape their current degenerate states.

title: Lights! Camera! Tweety!/Backstage Bugs
description: Lights, Camera, Tweety!: The Baby Looney Tunes are very eager to visit the local TV station, home of their favorite live children's show. When Floyd accidentally locks them inside the studio moments before airtime, they are forced to put on today's program all by themselves!/Backstage Bugs: Baby Bugs can't wait to see his favorite children's musical group, The Wormies, and he absolutely thrills to the notion of possibly meeting his personal hero, Willie Wormie, backstage after the show. But Bugs fails to heed Floyd's warning about staying with the group in the crowded arena and suffers consequences when he gets separated from Floyd.

title: The Prince and the Playdate
description: Prince Ivandoe is a prisoner in the castle dungeon of Jezabel's mother, Grizabella - the unpredictable and slightly terrifying "Queen of Thieves". Whilst waiting for a royal random, Grizabella encourages her daughter to enjoy her "playdate" with the little prince. Prince Ivandoe is all too eager to do the same. However, when Grizabella demands that Prince Ivandoe perform as her Royal Jester - Ivandoe and Bert realise they need to escape. At once!!
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Malefactor
description: Khyber and his dog attacks Ben and Rook while they're at the "Olde Bellwood Days" festival, but does the hunter have other plans? (Introducing new Nemetrix alien Hypnotick.)

title: The Apology
description: For once in his life Gumball is the one who's owed an apology...from Ms Simian!

title: Speechless on the Seine
description: While in Paris, France, Ben catches Zombozo robbing the Louvre, but when Zombozo hypnotizes Ben to remain speechless, Ben must navigate a foreign land like a mime in order to stop the criminal clown and his travelling circus.

title: Oddjobs
description: Hedgehog and Oscar investigate problems at U.M.P.S. and meet the new intern, Oddjobs, who's a great friend but a terrible employee.

title: Tummy Trouble
description: When the Incursean armada kidnaps the Gourmand Queen, Ben and Rook must get the warring Gormand factions to work together to save her and stop the Incursean invasion.

title: Andreas' Fault
description: The team discovers that alien con-man Argit has somehow become the leader of the Forever Knights.

title: Big Tick
description: A giant alien tick that sucks planets dry, lands on Earth with the sole purpose of destroying the planet and only a new alien hero can stop it.

title: Slay Cheese
description: It's picture day at Acme Loo! Babs accidentally shrinks herself, Buster fails to get the perfect photo day haircut, Plucky gives lessons on being direct, and Hamton struggles to find his photo persona.

title: Kevin 11
description: After a big argument with Max, Ben rebels by going out on his own in the Big Apple and makes friends with Kevin 11, who has plans for the Omnitrix.

title: A New Life
description: Apple and Onion both leave their homes and follow their dreams to the big city but things don't go quite to plan.

title: The Postcard
description: High Five Ghost wants to reunite with a girl from his past.

title: The Prince and the Dreamy Ogre
description: Prince Ivandoe must enter the feared Underground Kingdom of the Ogres to find a secret pathway. Fortunately, the unappreciated Prince Goldenlocks is planning to run away to the Up Above. So, in an unwanted musical extravaganza, they help each other escape.
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: The Music Store Thief
description: Instruments have been going missing from Apple and Onion's favourite music store and Chicken Nugget (who's in charge of security) doesn't want them hanging around and getting in the way.

title: The Visitor
description: A mysterious alien named Xylene shows up and wants to return the Omnitrix to its rightful owner, Grandpa Max!

title: Super Alien Hero Buddy Adventures
description: Ben discovers his alien heroes have been ripped off by a lame cartoon and he is not happy. So he sets out to make things right.

title: Creature Feature
description: When Max dozes off before a double feature, Ben and Gwen are left to save the drive-in by themselves as the evil magician Hex brings the movie monster "That" to life, and unleashes him on the unsuspecting moviegoers.

title: Tourist Trap
description: While messing with the World's Largest Rubberband Ball at a tourist trap, Ben accidently releases some mischievous electrical creatures.

title: Side Effects
description: Ben catches a cold and the symptoms wreak havoc on his alien heroes. To make matters even worse, he has to battle a creature made from cockroaches.

title: Apple's Focus
description: Apple decides to help Onion achieve his dream of competing on a baking show.

title: Susie and her Sister Chapter 1: Heathers
description: Susie's new little sister has a gift for magic, but it's causing problems for the community. Will Susie learn to accept that Mildred is more powerful, and will the townsfolk be able to accept the most powerful witch in the world?

title: Cool for Cats/Ten Loonies in a Bed (song)/Time Out!
description: Cool for Cats: Sylvester believes a commercial that says eating Chewy Chomps will make him cool./Time Out!: Bugs, Daffy and Taz are disciplined by having a time out in the corner.

title: Election Day
description: Apple and Onion realize that the Mayor of their city is corrupt and they vow to put an end to that.

title: Who's Your Granny?/If You're Looney (song)/The Tattletale
description: Who's Your Granny?: When Granny gets sick, Lola tries to take over her responsibilities./The Tattletale: Lola begins tattling on the other babies until her friends no longer want to play with her.

title: The Ballad of Mr. Baumann
description: The grouchy storekeeper has a big secret, and she's not of this Earth.

title: Ben 10 vs. Negative 10 Part 1
description: Ben, Max Ben and Gwen investigate a couple of daring break-ins, only to discover they were both once secret Plumber installations. What our heroes find out is that those responsible for the break-ins are working for The Forever King. He's brought together a rogue's gallery of some of Ben's most notorious enemies to eventually steal the world's most powerful energy source...located deep inside the Plumber bunker at Mount Rushmore.

title: The Final Battle Part 2
description: A defeated Ben gives up the Omnitrix to save himself and his friends. Powerless, he boards Vilgax's ship for their final battle!

title: How 'Bout Some Effort
description: It's Valentine's Day and Cyborg goes to great lengths to make it special for his girlfriend Jinx.

title: Torso Soap
description: The League of Legs returns to help stop crime and learn about the importance of leg washing.

title: Deep
description: Ben, Kevin, and Gwen journey to the center of an all-water planet in an attempt to finally of capture Aggregor.

title: The Trade
description: After accidentally trading away Chad's favorite baseball card, Clarence has to trade it back! Determined to become an expert, Clarence transforms himself into a slick salesman, before facing the ultimate deal.

title: A Nightmare on Aberdale Street: Balance's Revenge
description: In this Halloween adventure, Clarence uses a special jack-o-lantern to enter the world of people's dreams. He discovers that something mysterious is causing his friends to have nightmares, and Clarence needs to stop it!

title: The Tunnel
description: After Clarence accidentally knocks Belson's new video game down a storm drain, Belson enters the large underground sewer tunnel to retrieve it. When Belson doesn't return, Clarence must decide whether or not to go in after him.

title: A Matter of Pride
description: Apple & Onion's jobs have become too demeaning. They decide to put their foots down. It's a matter of pride.

title: The Perfect Team
description: Onion worries his relationship with Apple is in jeopardy when a stray cat enters the picture.

title: River of Gold
description: Apple and Onion find a mysterious book but they better read it fast before it disappears forever.

title: Broccoli
description: Some major construction is taking place on the roof of Apple and Onion's building and they can't get back home till it's finished.

title: Falafel's Car Keys
description: Apple & Onion are deemed responsible enough to borrow Falafel's car for their first road trip together. Nothing will go wrong, and they're going to make sure of that… by getting some practice in.

title: Girl Trouble
description: Gwen's cousin, Sunny, pays a visit but she's more than meets the eye!

title: Innervasion
description: The mysteries of the Omni-Enhancements are solved when Ben battles an alien invasion coming from inside the Omnitrix.

title: High Stress Express
description: During a live feed of the new transcontinental bullet train, La Grange enters the picture to outrace the train, but Ben joins in on the fun and will stop at nothing to come out on top!

title: Susie's Fantastical Scavenger Hunt
description: Oscar and Hedgehog must learn to exist without each other when they are put on different teams during a scavenger hunt.

title: Hero Time
description: A starstruck Ben dates a beautiful young movie actress, while his childhood hero makes a comeback.

title: He's Just Not Here Right Now
description: Oscar and Hedgehog encounter New Jersey's most famous piece of folklore.

title: Saxophone Come Home
description: Oscar befriends a teenage Yeti.

title: Log Cabin Fever/A Mid-Autumn Night's Scream
description: Log Cabin Fever: Granny takes the Baby Looney Tunes back to a simpler lifestyle during a rustic weekend spent in an 1800's log cabin, where they learn to enjoy life minus all modern conveniences. Baby Bugs and Baby Daffy get in trouble for smuggling their palm-sized computer game along, and they face Granny's consequences./A Mid-Autumn Night's Scream: The Baby Looney Tunes first Halloween involves a costume contest for Lola, Melissa and Petunia, group trick-or-treating and Sylvester overcoming his fear of confronting an allegedly scary neighbor.

title: The Most Dangerous Game Show
description: Ben fights for his life on an alien reality show.

title: Bros in Space
description: Rook brings Ben to his home planet to meet the family. Unbeknownst to them, an old foe is raising an army to steal the planet's most precious resource!  (Introducing Rook's family.)

title: Bon Voyage
description: Aboard the SS Pettigrew on its final voyage, Ben must not only battle seasickness but Steam Smythe, who looks to use his mechanical creatures to sink the steamship's modern replacement and the passengers with it!

title: X Equals Ben Plus 2
description: The Incursians blame Earth for the kidnapping of Emperor Milleus' daughter, Attea. Raff, the Emperor's right-hand man, recruits Kevin to help them recover Attea before the Emperor uses the Conquest Ray to destroy the Earth. Ben transforms into Alien X but soon discovers his powers are too great to control. Ben must gain control over Alien X before Emperor Milleus can use the Conquest Ray to blow up Earth.

title: Hunted
description: Three alien bounty hunters are hot on Ben's trail. But one of them is a secret agent trying to make sure the Omnitrix does not fall into evil hands.

title: Be-Knighted
description: The Forever Knights have secured an alien weapon that will help them kill a dragon they have held captive for centuries. After the dragon escapes, they must ask Ben for help in recapturing it. Ben agrees to help but soon discovers the real identity of the dragon along with its ulterior motive for wanting to return to the Forever Knights. Ben must use his head, not just his brawn, in finding a peaceful solution to the impending fight between the dragon and the knights.

title: Fool's Gold
description: When an alien named Orb asks for help finding his missing friend, Decka, Ben, Gwen and Kevin are surprised to learn just how valuable a friend he is.

title: Absolute Power Part 2
description: It's Ben and company's last stand against a foe they can't bring themselves to fight!

title: Don't Laze Me, Bro
description: Ben and his arch-enemy Billy Billions clash in a duel for supremacy at the world's largest Laser Tag Park, LASER TOWN. But, when Billy inadvertently ignites a robot rebellion, and the lasers are set from tag to disintegrate, their childish game escalates into a full blown war! The two foes find that they must set aside their petty differences and team up in order to make it out alive, let alone save the day!

title: The Big Rumble
description: A family of comically raucous rocks moves in near a Whiffle garden and drives them to distraction with their ground-pounding games. Funshine gets the rocks to leave. But when he learns their ground-pounding creates new soil, he must convince them to come back.

title: This One Goes to 11
description: During one last stop by a toy store before Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max's maiden voyage across the Atlantic, Ben runs into an old bully, Kevin 11, who now has new powers. He's able to transform into aliens just like Ben, such as the bootleg doppelganger of Cannonbolt. Wreckingbolt!

title: Bomzobo Lives
description: During a routine trip to the DMV, Max takes a driving test to renew his license, but when a disguised Zombozo hijacks the role of instructor, Ben goes alien to stop the baddie and save their family road trip.

title: Looney Games
description: The Looney Builders are hired by Mayor Leghorn to build the venue for the Looney Games. They soon become overwhelmed by the job and must ask for help.

title: The Prince and the Princenappers
description: Whilst travelling through the notoriously dangerous Forest of Outlaws, Prince Ivandoe is repeatedly Princenapped! First by a gang of wolves in disguise, then by Boaris and his Merry Boars, and finally by Feral and her gang of cat-thieves - all of them hoping to secure a royal ransom. Luckily for Prince Ivandoe and Bert, they are rescued by the fair Jezabel - though, as it turns out, not with the noblest of intentions.
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Use It or Lose It
description: The Monitor tries to make the Titans use their powers properly instead of the silly ways they've been used in the past.

title: Guitar of Rock
description: Mordecai and Rigby have to help Benson replace an electric guitar signed by a rock star, or Benson's fired.

title: Ready to Rumble
description: After Ben thinks he's broken Gwen's computer, he sneaks off and enters an "ultimate wrestling competition" to win enough money to buy her a new one. On the mat as Fourarms, he becomes an instant celebrity hit with the fans and ends up going up against a tandem of odd looking brothers with special mutant-like powers. Initially adversaries, Ben and the brothers become allies when Ben discovers the brothers are beholden to a powerful mob boss. Ben helps the brothers defeat the mob boss and his henchmen, and in the end realizes Gwen's computer was never really broken.

title: The Ultimate Enemy Part 2
description: Vilgax re-emerges in his most powerful form ever! Can Ben stop him and save the universe?

title: Charmed, I'm Sure
description: Still stranded on the monster planet Anur Transyl, Ben and Rook reluctantly team up with Charmcaster to take on Zs' Skayr.

title: The Gauntlet
description: After years of Ben being picked on by the school bullies Cash and JT, Ben stands up for himself and embarrasses both of them in front of a group of peers. An upset Cash later retaliates by pushing Kevin's GTO down a hill where a robot hand pops out of the trunk after it hits a tree. Cash and JT steal off with the glove only to have the glove possess Cash, granting him the power to get revenge on Ben.

title: Revenge of the Swarm
description: When Julie is kidnapped, Ben blames Elena who swears she had nothing to do with it. But the nanochips in her lab point to the truth.

title: The Alliance
description: As Fourarms, Ben works to thwart an armored truck robbery by a tough female gang leader named Joey, who delivers a disturbing message from Vilgax.

title: Barb and the Spotted Bears Chapter 3: Nightcap
description: Barb and the elves band together to protect the source of all magic from a pair of fiendish intruders. But will Barb be able to outsmart two rascals as old as the world itself?

title: Greetings from Techadon
description: A mysterious object crashes in the center of Bellwood, unleashing Techadon robots with one thing on their mind, destroying Ben!

title: Christmas Spirit
description: Apple & Onion know exactly what gifts they want this Christmas but all their money has been squandered. Luckily they find a suitably festive way to make back that money.

title: Cough It Up
description: Psyphon and a gang of bounty hunters are after Argit, who is in possession of a dangerous weapon!

title: Weapon XI Part 1
description: Kevin and Argit attempt to warn the amalgam kids about the Rooters intentions meanwhile Ben, Rook, and Gwen set off to find Kevin and land themselves in the Null Void!

title: Couples Retreat
description: After Darkstar opens the Door to Anywhere, Charmcaster comes through and the two team up to give Ben, Gwen and Kevin the fight of a lifetime.

title: Rad
description: With Plumber agents trapped in Incursean territory, Ben and Rook must employ the services of Rad Dudesman, the roughest, toughest smuggler in the galaxy.  (Introducing Rad Dudesman, return of classic Ben alien, Eye Guy.)

title: Max to the Max
description: While Ben, Gwen, and Max hike to a waterfall, the Bugg Brothers are back with a plan to duplicate Diamondhead; but when their cloning ray gun fires on Max instead, multiplying him endlessly, Gwen and Ben must round up all the Maxes while also fighting off the Bugg Brothers.

title: All Washed Up/My Bunny Lies Over the Ocean (song)/Did Not! Did Too!
description: All Washed Up: Taz decides he doesn't like taking a bath./Did Not! Did Too!: Bugs and Lola temporarily decide that they don't want to be friends any longer.

title: Hair Cut-Ups/Does Your Tongue Hang Low (song)/A Clean Sweep
description: Hair Cut-Ups: Lola is afraid of getting her first haircut./A Clean Sweep: Daffy tries to avoid cleaning up by sweeping his toys under a rug.

title: Mystery, Incorporeal
description: An old enemy emerges while Ben and Rook visit Kevin and Gwen at college.

title: Lucky Girl
description: Ben battles an evil sorcerer whose power whose emanates from mystic charms, one of which turns Gwen into her own superhero named Lucky Girl.

title: The Beginning of the End
description: As the final battle between the Forever Knights and Dagon's Esoterica heats up, Ben finds himself caught in the middle of an intergalactic showdown.

title: World Cup
description: It's time to relax in the expensive massage chairs that Apple & Onion have rented for the month. It's also time for the Football (soccer) World Cup and Falafel's team, Egypt are in the tournament..

title: Burger's Trampoline
description: After learning that Burger has a trampoline, Apple and Onion pay him a visit. Burger thinks they came especially to see him and is overjoyed.

title: Evil's Encore
description: Dr. Animo reminisces about when he once took control of the Plumber's HQ in Mount Rushmore. (Flashback episode.)

title: You Poor Saps
description: Tensions run high in this week's challenge when the Campers find themselves in a sticky situation.

title: Apple's in Charge
description: Apple is put in charge of the Dollar Store for the very first time.

title: Flounder Fam
description: Farah is embarrassed by her inability to fit in with her family. Ice Bear trains her in the art of camouflage.

title: Cyber Sweetheart
description: Thinking life is back to normal, the Spies are shocked when a horrifying new boss at WOOHP summons them for their 'retirement'. As the Spies escape, they work with Toby and an unlikely ally to rescue Jerry and Zerlina and save all of WOOHP World.

title: Everyone's Tube
description: Through a standard video browsing session online, we get a glimpse of the different kinds of videos the Bears have posted.

title: It Was Them
description: Dr. Animo has escaped his Plumber prison, and Ben and Rook must track him down before he turns the world into his personal mutant ant farm! (Introducing Nemetrix alien Slamworm, Galvan Plumbers Blukic and Driba, Arctiguana, new Ben alien Crashhopper.)

title: Twin-Con
description: Babs and Buster attend a twin convention but are soon ostracized for not being exactly the same. Hamton accidentally becomes famous, and Plucky steps up as his manager. And Sweetie won't let anything stop her from finishing her board game.

title: Cool Guy Clarence
description: When Clarence meets JT, the kid who mows their lawn, he finds a fast friend who shows him some cool new music, a new outlook on life and a sweet rat-tail! Clarence leans into the rat tail lifestyle, discovering a whole new side of Aberdale he never knew existed.

title: Talent Show
description: Clarence throws a big talent show in his yard to showcase all the fun hidden talents of his friends. But when Brady claims he's talentless, Clarence sets out to prove that everyone has something special to share!

title: The Chupaca-bro
description: Team Tennyson discovers that a small village's goats are being terrorized by the legendary Chupacabra, but when Ben realizes it's actually Dr. Animo, our hero must thwart the dastardly doctor before he uses the essence of the goats to power up into an unstoppable form!

title: Rad Monster Party
description: Ben and Rook enlist the help of intergalactic smuggler Rad Dudesman to fly them through the Anur System, the home of the monstrous aliens!

title: The Remote
description: The Wattersons' battle for possession of the TV remote gets dirty.

title: Mind Your Manners/Down by the Cage (song)/Petunia the Piggy Bank
description: Mind Your Manners: The babies learn proper dinner etiquette when preparing to dine out with Granny./Petunia the Piggy Bank: The kids start getting an allowance but only Petunia thinks to save for something special.

title: Tomorrow Today
description: When Max drags the kids to see a defunct "House of the Future" built by his childhood idol, Ben discovers Steam Smythe is busy excavating the joint on the search for a powerful device that will allow him to create devastating weapons for his war on progress. Only Max's devotion to his childhood idol and Ben's faith in dreams can save tomorrow... today!

title: Introducing Kevin 11
description: At a local swap meet, Ben instead sets his sights on a Sumo Slammer collectible, but when Kevin takes it for himself, our hero must get it back by overcoming Kevin's secret weapon: an 11th alien!

title: Fun Fight at the Oh Cake Corral
description: It's definitely no cake walk as Campers compete in the ultimate island bake-off. A very special guest judge even stops by for a bite!

title: Blast Off Bugs/Baby Brouhaha
description: Blastoff Bugs: Baby Bugs tries to realize his dream of traveling to the moon while the Baby Looney Tunes are on a space museum visit./Baby Brouhaha: Overhearing Granny on the phone say she's expecting a baby, Baby Bugs goes into overdrive, revving up the Baby Looney Tunes to prepare to care for an infant.

title: The Ultimate Heist
description: Albedo seeks a device that will finally change him back into his Galvan form; meanwhile, Ben is locked in Plumber HQ prison.

title: Rigby in the Sky with Burrito
description: Rigby wants to accomplish at least one thing he said he would accomplish before his High School reunion.

title: Escape from Aggregor
description: Five aliens from another galaxy attempt to escape from their mysterious captor.

title: King of the Castle
description: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max next travel to Castle Bishopbrook to visit a distant relative who's royalty, but when Ben encounters a "ghost" at the haunted home, it turns out to actually be his new rival, Kevin 11, throwing even more twisted aliens his way: Thornblade, Undertow, and Dark Matter!

title: Jake the Dog
description: Jake and Prismo watch from the portal as the Ice King's crown makes Finn more and more powerful.

title: Inferno
description: Ben, Gwen and Kevin investigate the explosion of a mysterious machine, unleashing hundreds of rock eating aliens. Not good news for Kevin!

title: Screamcatcher
description: When a cavity forces Ben to the dentist his day gets even worse when the malevolent magician Hex uses a nearby dream catcher to bring our hero's fears to life and transports them both to a nightmarish dreamscape.

title: Susie and Ramona Chapter 3: Meet Me in Massachusetts
description: Susie and Ramona train a gaggle of witches until they have a full coven.

title: Hot Stretch
description: Ben and Rook encounter a race of elastic, hot-blooded aliens in Undertown who want to use a stolen nuclear fusion engine to activate a volcano! (Introducing Ester, Seebik & the Kraaho.)

title: Ben 10 Returns Part 2
description: After defeating the Forever Knights, Ben, Gwen and Kevin follow a lead that takes them to a secret base in the desert. There they hope to find their missing Grandpa but instead find a spaceship with a giant cannon. The Highbreed intend to use it to destroy a nearby city. The trio of heroes is able to stop the ship and afterward they decide to team up for good in order find the missing Grandpa Max and unveil the secret alien plot of the Highbreed.

title: Tomorrow's Bananas
description: Oscar and Hedgehog get an unsettling glimpse into the future.

title: The Prince and the Three-Headed Knight
description: When Prince Ivandoe discovers a secret chest, guarded by a three-headed knight, he is certain the Golden Feather lies within. However it turns out quite a different sort of feathery fellow lies within!
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Sausage and Sweetie Smash
description: Onion must stop Apple from falling prey to his obsession, but a certain phone game is proving to be quite an obstacle.

title: Forgeti
description: When Gwen drags Ben along on a hike in search of the legendary Forgeti, a yeti that makes people forget they ever saw it, Ben is dubious. But with Dr. Animo on the trail of the mythical beast as well, what looks like a hoax becomes a hero time adventure for the ages, if Ben can remember it ever happened.

title: Flower Power/Looney Tunes Zoo (song)/Lightning Bugs Sylvester
description: Flower Power: The babies all want to pick the best flowers for Granny but they end up destroying her garden./Lightning Bugs Sylvester: Sylvester learns to overcome his fear of lightning.

title: The Mother of All Vreedles
description: Ma Vreedle returns to Earth with a cloning machine and a plan to unleash 300 billion Pretty Boy Vreedles on the planet.

title: That's the Stuff
description: While touring a space museum, Ben's excitement multiplies when he learns that recently discovered space stuff is being examined inside the museum's lab. Once the stuff comes to life and the shape-shifting goo replicates our hero, Ben must look within if he is to stop the case of mistaken identity.

title: Big Trouble in Little Aberdale
description: After stumbling upon a mysterious new kid in their neighborhood , Clarence, Jeff and Sumo decide to take the kid out on the town showing him the fun of junk food, arcades and soda! However, this new lifestyle may be more then the new kid bargained for.

title: The Source Part I
description: As Cursed animals besiege Elu, Iyanu searches for The Source. Meanwhile, Biyi, Toye, Olori and Kanfo launch a counterattack against Chancellor Nuro and his forces, who are trying to prevent Iyanu from lifting the Curse on Yorubaland.

title: Barb and the Spotted Bears Chapter 2: Hot Milk and Careless Whispers
description: Barb tries to soothe the spotted bears with a dreamy invention, but soon finds herself outnumbered. Will Barb be able to even the playing field - or will she become the bears' next snack?

title: Plumber's Helpers
description: Manny and Helen are a rogue team of young plumbers trying to track down aliens. When they mistake Ben and his team for dangerous aliens, they end up kidnapping Kevin. Ben and Gwen need to track them down.

title: Barb and the Spotted Bears Chapter 1: A Barb is Born
description: On the third day of the world, Barb tries to save the ferns from being eaten by the spotted bears. But the bears are only getting hungrier and hungrier - will Barb be able to stop the ferns from going extinct?

title: Viktor: The Spoils
description: The return of the evil Dr. Viktor!

title: Yuri and the Bear
description: Baby Ice Bear lives alone in the arctic and meets a mysterious man named Yuri. Together they help each other survive the cold environment.

title: Mr. McStuffles/Twinkle, Baby Looney Star (song)/Picture This!
description: Mr. McStuffles: Daffy doesn't want to give up his old toy, even after he's outgrown it./Picture This: The babies create their own endings to fairytales.

title: Can I Keep It?
description: After stumbling upon a cute cat-dog-rabbit creature hybrid, or "Cadobbit," Ben ignores Grandpa Max's advice and sneaks the animal onto the Rustbucket, but is quickly in over his head as Dr. Amino's creation turns on him!

title: Dragonhead
description: In desperate need of a shower due, Apple and Onion resort to desperate measures.

title: Eyesore a Sunset
description: Art is subjective and Apple and Onion agree to let that get between them.

title: Saving Time
description: Mordecai and Rigby have to reset all the clocks in the park for Daylight Savings Time.

title: Showdown Part I
description: The Faction infiltrates Galvan in an attempt to destroy Azmuth.  (Introducing new Nemetrix aliens Omnivoracious & Vicetopus.)

title: Fun Proof
description: Apple and Onion want to become this week's "Most Fun People".

title: Ben 10 vs. Negative 10 Part 2
description: Ben, Max and Gwen put up an Alamo like stand inside the bunker at Mount Rushmore and against great odds take down the Forever King's band of baddies. In the end, Ben goes Upchuck and digests the powerful energy source, preventing the Forever King from using it for nefarious purposes. However this ultimate baddie is able to disappear...perhaps to return once again.

title: Framed
description: Kevin 11 is back and out for revenge. And with the ability to shape-shift into several of Ben's alien heroes, he's been framing Ben for his crimes.

title: Bad Penny
description: Ben is at the annual Big Bacon Pig Parade, but childhood friend Penny Heaven has met the family to ruin Ben's fun with her safety-obsessed self. While dodging Penny's overzealous safety precautions, Ben uncovers a plot by the Bug Brothers to steal helium from the parade balloons to rob banks with! Penny's badgering turns the heist into an accidental kidnapping so Ben must not only stop the robbery but save his least favorite safety monitor in the process.

title: Mr. Softball
description: Susie challenges the campers to a game of softball to get out of doing a chore.

title: The Prince and the Turnip Tricksters
description: Prince Ivandoe vows to capture the turnip thief... the very worst type of thief! Prince Ivandoe and Bert are guided by some suspiciously Germanic woodland characters towards an old cabin. It turns out to be an elaborate trap, devised by the Sassy Gnomes, to punish Ivandoe for his inconsiderate turnip-top littering.
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Don't Drink the Water
description: In Florida, Ben and Max accidentally come in contact with water from The Fountain of Youth. As a result, Max transforms into a kid and Ben a toddler, with Gwen having to deal with both of them. Our trio then must track down Hex who's found the source of the fountain and prevent him from drinking the water that will make him immortal and unstoppable.

title: Cousin's Day
description: It's Cousin's Day- another holiday the corporations made up to make more money and Apple and Onion are going to capitalise on it.

title: The Ultimate Enemy Part 1
description: Dagon is getting closer and closer to entering our dimension thanks to an old foe.

title: The Harder They Fall/The Hare Hid Under the Fountain (song)/Business as Unusual
description: The Harder They Fall: Bugs is embarrassed to admit he doesn't know how to skate./Business as Unusual: Bugs and Daffy open competing lemonade stands.

title: The Basketball Liaries
description: With the help from Basketball, Oscar makes an impressive shot that scores him a spot on the Gold League.

title: Ocean Gem
description: The Ocean disappears on the first day of summer and Beach City is in a panic.

title: The Cruel Giggling Ghoul
description: The Titans go to an amusement park to see LeBron James but instead help solve a mystery.

title: Momsoon
description: Hedgehog gets a call during her radio show from someone who needs her help.

title: The Secret of Chromastone
description: Ben meets up with Tetrax but is caught off guard when Tetrax demands that he give him Chromastone. Before Ben has a chance to explain, Tetrax attacks.

title: They Lurk Below
description: Max's old friend has built the world's only underwater resort, and Ben, Gwen and Max are invited for a sneak peak. But it turns out in order to power the resort, Max's friend took an energy orb from a race of underwater aliens. Now, the aliens want their energy orb back and destroy the resort in order to get it.

title: The Rooters of All Evil
description: Meet the Rooters, the Black Ops wing of the Plumbers from the Null Void. They've come looking for someone close to Ben, and they mean business!

title: The Prince and the Chicken of Doom
description: A fire-breathing Giant Chicken is destroying the local farmers' prize vegetables. Prince Ivandoe vows to capture the Giant Chicken, but... gets captured by her instead. He seems to bring out her maternal side, and she in turn reminds him of Nanny. So when an angry mob attacks, Ivandoe heroically jumps to his Giant Nanny-Chicken's defence.
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: The Prince and the Valiant Quest
description: Prince Ivandoe and Bert set off on their heroic quest and, almost immediately, a winged serpent steals their map to Eagle Mountain. But that shan't stop a plucky young buck and his devoted squire from fulfilling their destiny. With the assistance of a quite staggeringly incompetent Dwarf called Alan, a new sword is forged and the Quest continue-eth!
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: The Ring Leader
description: While winning big on a Sumo Slammers video game, Ben gets the idea to win a wrestling match for real until an intimidating wrestler named Iron Kyle decides to make it a true challenge.

title: The Prince and the All-Alone Gnome
description: Hansi, a Sassy Gnome, has been left all alone by his brothers. Bert takes pity on him and convinces a reluctant Prince Ivandoe to help reunite him with his brothers. Despite Hansi's obsession with jumping on Ivandoe's head, they form an unlikely bond.
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Acorn Graduation
description: Hedgehog endures her first magic lesson with Susie, while Oscar sets out to save her seat for a must-see event: Acorn Graduation!

title: It's My Bat Birthday Too, Yeah
description: When the Batwheels celebrate their mutual birthdays together in the park, party games that should be fun start to go mysteriously wrong.

title: Nothing Can Stop Us
description: Hot Dog has the audition of his life but he is missing something crucial. Apple and Onion are tasked with bringing it to him and they are adamant that nothing will stand in their way.

title: Food Around the Corner
description: Ben as Gravattack attempts to moderate a fragile peace treaty, but must endure the attacks of tiny alien fleas, which have inhabited his body.

title: Not Funny
description: With their 6 month friend anniversary approaching, Apple is in danger of losing his best friend.

title: Lowlifes
description: Apple & Onion cannot allow themselves to be viewed by society- and more importantly by smug old Chicken Nugget-as lowlifes.

title: Under Wraps
description: When Ben and Gwen are sent to a farm to learn the value of hard work, what they really learn is that an evil alien mummy has arrived on Earth.

title: A Bully for Bugs/The Wheel Deal
description: A Bully for Bugs: With Floyd's adult assistance, Baby Bugs and the Baby Looney Tunes learn an effective way to deal with a bully. /The Wheel Deal: Everyone's excited about a grand bicycle outing through the park, everyone except Tweety whose little legs don't quite reach the pedals. Frustrated after riding on the back of Floyd's bicycle while everyone else has fun, Tweety is ready to go home.

title: Are We There Yet/Save Our Cinnamon
description: Are We There, Yet?: During a long road trip, Floyd, obsessed with taking the Baby Looney Tunes to visit the distant, annual Acme Garlic Festival, endures countless variants of the universal kid question, are we there, yet? Despite Floyd's garlic agenda, fate has other plans./Save Our Cinnamon: Granny's sister's beloved bakery, Cakery Bakery Dock, home of her wonderful trademark cinnamon rolls, is being put out of business so her landlord can tear down the bakery to build a parking lot. This galvanizes the Baby Looney Tunes to work together to bake one giant cinnamon roll as a tourist attraction to save the bakery, a project that ends up involving the whole town.

title: The Prince and the Show-Off Stallion
description: When the legendary Mighty Stallion "out-hero's" Prince Ivandoe by saving the Bunny Village from a terrifying beastie, Ivandoe loses his confidence. Even though the Stallion demands payments in carrots, which is in direct violation of the Hero Code, Ivandoe feels he cannot compete with such a magnificent fellow. Bert must help his master find his mojo again, before the Bunny Village is destroyed by an even bigger terrifying beastie!
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: A Turtle Named Mrytle/Oh My Darling Coyote (song)/There's Nothing Like a Good Book
description: A Turtle Named Myrtle: A trip to the seashore brings the Baby Looney Tunes into contact with a just-hatched turtle that Melissa, apart from the rest because of her bossy attitude, names Myrtle. Melissa just loves little Myrtle and wants to keep her from walking into the ocean so that she may take Myrtyle home for herself./There's Nothing Like a Good Book: A nagging question regarding the composition of the moon brings the Baby Looney Tunes to experience their very first visit to the library.

title: Double or Nothing
description: Albedo, aka Negative Ben, returns as the star big stage production about Ben Tennyson's life. Sure he needs the money, but what is he really up to?

title: Lambporcini
description: Apple and Onion are very happy with their sweet new matching designer outfits they bought from known scam-artist Street Dog. That's until Chicken Nugget mistakes them for something they are not.

title: Redbird's Bogus Beach Day
description: Redbird gets excited when he learns that Batman and Robin are taking him and Bam for a drive up the coast! But when the Joker and his van Prank show up unexpectedly and ruin Redbird's beach day plans, Bam helps him realize that even though things didn't go exactly as planned, they still had a great day!

title: A Lot Like Lola/Baby Elmer Had a Friend (song)/Mother's Day Madness
description: A Lot Like Lola: Lola wants everyone to be more like her until they all start acting exactly like her./Mother's Day Madness: The babies compete to see who can create the best Mother's Day card.

title: Stuck on You
description: Kybher, aided by a booger-like slime biot named Skurd, attacks Ben & co, but the tables turn when Skurd gloms onto Ben!

title: When Harry Met Barry
description: Faced with two potential husbands -- burly Harry and sensitive Barry -- Barb enlists Hedgehog and Oscar to help her weigh her options.

title: Fused
description: Ben is trapped in the form of his newest transformation, a form Aggregor intends to destroy.

title: Ben Again
description: When Eon causes 11-year old Ben swap minds with teen Ben, it's up to Gwen, Rook, and Professor Paradox to set things straight.  (Featuring Eon and Professor Paradox.)

title: Band Together/Oh Where, Oh Where Has My Baby Martian Gone (song)/War of the Weirds
description: Band Together: The babies learn about music and improvise their own orchestra./War of the Weirds: Marvin the Martian comes to visit, and the babies learn to accept differences.

title: The Frogs of War Part 2
description: With Ben missing, the Incurseans now control the Earth. It's up to Rook and the remaining Plumbers to lead the resistance and fight back! (Introducing new Ben alien, Bullfrag.)

title: Which Watch
description: After a battle with Kevin gets mysteriously cut short, Ben turns his attention to one upping Gwen at Space Camp. But, when his arch-nemesis, Kevin, returns with his sights strangely set on his cousin, our hero must uncover who is really behind it all, Charmcaster!

title: Mine!/Over the Burrow (song)/Sylvester the Pester
description: Mine!: Daffy learns a lesson in doing the right thing when he finds a purse filled with money./Sylvester the Pester: An attention-starved Sylvester won't let Granny have any time to herself.

title: War of the Worlds Part 1
description: Ben must recruit the other Plumber's kids to help stop the Highbreed invasion of Earth.

title: The Prince and the Foggy Bog Lady
description: Prince Ivandoe charges off into the foggy swamp to find some turnips but finds the feared Bog Lady instead! Meanwhile Bert gets enchanted by the Queen of the Mist. But which one should they fear the most?
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Susie Appreciation Day
description: Hedgehog and Oscar find themselves trapped in Susie's cabin and must escape undetected.

title: The Vengers
description: Billy Billions, Kangaroo Kommando, and Captain Nemesis team up to take down Ben, and claim his place as protector of Bellwood?!?

title: Panamanian Night Monkey
description: Apple and Onion must adopt unorthodox measures if they are to see this special animal at the zoo.

title: Bottle Catch
description: Apple and Onion's favorite game attracts some unexpected attention.

title: Video Games
description: Ben's celebrity lands him a starring role in his own video game.

title: Take 10
description: While trying to film his own indie film, Ben accidentally allows the Bug Gang to go free and when he takes the fight to their hidden lair Ben has to take on their narcissistic leader, the Ant Queen.

title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad Ben World Part 1
description: Alternate dimensions, duplicate Bens and villains from throughout time and space! Just another day in Bellwood.

title: Animorphosis
description: As the Tennyson trio dig up dinosaur fossils in the Badlands, Ben is unaware that Vilgax and Dr. Amino have teamed up to steal alien DNA from within the Omnitrix, but once extracted, Vilgax double crosses his fellow villain. Ben must now join forces with the evil doctor to have a chance to defeat the big baddie, but can Dr. Amino be trusted?

title: Save the Last Dance
description: Ben grows worried as he slowly starts to lose control of the Omnitrix.

title: The Prince and the Squeak of Obedience
description: Feral and her gang of cat-thieves have stolen Prince Ivandoe's map to Eagle Mountain. Cupcake, the pink-poodle survivalist offers to train Prince Ivandoe to become a Jungle Warrior. So that together they can infiltrate Feral's camp and get back whats theirs. For Feral also stole a precious item from Cupcake... one that exerts a strange hold over him - "The Squeak of Obedience!"
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Comfort Level/Twinkle Baby Looney Star (song)/Like a Duck to Water
description: Comfort Level: Sylvester learns to live without his blankey./Like a Duck to Water: Daffy overcomes his fear of the swimming pool.

title: The Prince and the Unruly Royal
description: Prince Ivandoe receives instructions from his father, The Mighty Stag. He is to escort his spoilt cousin Dudley to a correctional school, ran by Posy Pippins - the strictest and most feared Governess in the land! However, along the way, much to Bert's dismay, Ivandoe falls under the influence of the unruly Dudley and starts to misbehave. So much so that when they arrive at Posy Pippins' Unruly School, she decides to keep both Dudley and Ivandoe! Bert attempts to rescue Prince Ivandoe by posing as an even stricter Governor.
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Animo Crackers
description: Dr. Animo from the future comes back to the present to help himself defeat Ben once and for all. (Introducing new Ben alien, Gutrot.)

title: Belson Gets a Girlfriend
description: Clarence is in disbelief when he learns his best friend Belson has a new girlfriend named Pipi. But when he observes their less than romantic behavior, he decides that he needs to teach them the ways of love to help keep their fling afloat!

title: It's My Party
description: Oscar and Hedgehog plan a surprise birthday party for Susie.

title: A Knight to Remember
description: Vilgax gets a hold of Old George's sword, and tries to gain Dagon's power. Big mistake! And Ben discovers two new alien heroes: Fasttrack and Eatle.

title: Canoe Believe It?
description: During a fun-filled day of canoe jousting, a special friendship is founded and an outed cheater gets pounded.

title: Shave a Little Off the Wheel
description: A mouse in heels befriends a rogue snowflake.

title: Meeting of the Minds
description: While Oscar helps Hedgehog find her wand, Susie tries to convince the Meeting of the Minds that Hedgehog isn't responsible enough for magic.

title: Rustbucket RIP
description: During a tour of historic Oldeville Ben finds a rare Sumo Slammers card, but when Billy Billions comes to claim the same card Ben has to battle Billy's high-tech drones which have hijacked the Rust Bucket!

title: The Prince and the Sassy Skaters
description: Prince Ivandoe has had enough of Goldenlocks' silly, unheroic singing and sends him on his way. But when Ivandoe is captured by the Sassy Gnomes' terrifying ice-skating Daddy, Goldenlocks is his only hope.
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Busy Box
description: Kevin, Ben, and Gwen find a curious box that has the ability to turn into a robot version of whatever it sees. All is well till the Vreedles show up.

title: Pier Pressure
description: After Julie Yamamoto wins a tennis match, Ben gets up the nerve to take her out on a date to the nearby Pier. Their first date is ruined as Ship, a small piece of an alien pilot, begins to take over the carnival rides and attacks Ben. Ben is able to withstand the attacks only to have Ship kidnap Julie! Ben runs the risk of exposing his secret to Julie as he is forced to follow Ship and find out why Ship insists on fighting him.

title: All That Glitters
description: Grandpa Max left a message for Ben instructing him to gather a team of heroes. Ben finds a powerful new ally named Mike Morningstar but the addition of Mike to the team tests the relationships of Ben, Gwen and Kevin. Ben learns the importance of using judgment as a leader when our group of heroes finds the truth behind a series of attacks by Zombie Girls.

title: Apple's Short
description: Apple wants to experience love.

title: Outbreak
description: When Dr. Psychobos steals a part out of the Omnitrix, causing chaotic side effects, it's up to Ben, Rook, and a small team of Plumbers get everything back to normal. (Introducing new Ben alien Kickin' Hawk, temp Ben alien Walkatrout, Upchuck Rook.)

title: Ghostfreaked Out
description: Ben's internal demons get externalized when Ghostfreak escapes from his watch and becomes a full fledged being on his own. The renegade alien then realizes he needs to meld with Ben's DNA in order to survive.

title: Ultimate Weapon
description: When Max finds out that part of an alien weapon has been unearthed in Texas, he becomes obsessed with finding it. In doing so, he leads Ben and Gwen on a wild adventure.

title: The Fly
description: Apple and Onion must rid their apartment of a fly or face eviction.

title: Puddle and the King Chapter 2: Royally Bored
description: Hedgehog and Oscar discover alien jesters who live under the floorboards of the castle.

title: Blukic and Driba Go to Area 51
description: A mysterious Galvan arrives and demands Blukic and Driba to give back a super powerful weapon needed to stop a threat to Earth.

title: Apple's Formula
description: Apple needs to find a formula for comedy that will land him a movie role.

title: The Teen Titans Go Easter Holiday Classic
description: The Easter Bunny is missing, and it's up to the Titans to find him before Easter is ruined.

title: Too Hot to Handle
description: A radioactive alien menace tricks Kevin into freeing him from his containment suit.

title: Hole In Roof
description: Suddenly the hole in the roof is no longer a laughing matter but one of a life or death.

title: Catacombs
description: Oscar, Hedgehog, Lucy, and Saxophone must return a yeti comb to its home to save the island from a really bad hair day.

title: Open House Cookies
description: Jerk Chicken is selling his house and Apple and Onion have been showing a lot of interest which definitely has nothing to do with the delicious cookies out on offer.

title: A Change of Face
description: In Salem Massachusetts, Ben, Gwen and Max once again go up against Charmcaster, whose goal is to switch souls with Ben and possess the Omnitrix. However, Charmcaster first accidentally switches identities with Gwen, and then as spells fly back and forth, Ben and Gwen even end up in one another's bodies before they team up to get rid of Charmcaster once and for all.

title: The Clocktopus
description: In a peaceful coastal town, Ben must not only face the archaic antagonist Steam Smythe and his latest creation, the Clocktopus, but also his deepest, darkest fear: Squids!

title: Washington B.C.
description: Ben must use the Omnitrix to transform into alien heroes to battle Dr. Amino and his transmorphed dinosaurs running rampant in Washington DC.

title: Single Handed
description: A bounty hunter is hot on Ben, but when he gets his chance to remove the Omnitrix from Ben's wrist, he sends Ben deep into the Null Void!

title: The Prince and the Dark Lord of Moletown
description: Prince Ivandoe is unsurprised to discover that he is worshipped by a group of moles. Their leader, the sinister Dark Lord of Moletown, is convinced that Ivandoe's magic potion once bestowed upon him the ability to see in the daylight. The Dark Lord now wishes for Ivandoe to use his magic on his moley minions, so that they might rise up as an unstoppable army and take over the forest! When the moles realize Ivandoe isn't actually magic, things go a little "squiggly".
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Chrono Moss
description: Craig and his friends come upon a mysterious Moss Village, which could aid them in their quest for the Heart of the Forest.

title: Baby Boi TP
description: Apple and Onion run out of toilet paper because Apple's been building a huge modern art sculpture with it. They're going to need more if Apple is to finish and Onion is to be able to resume his normal toilet activities.

title: Face Your Fears
description: Apple and Onion must face their fears if they are to save French Fry from their bad advice.

title: The Big Bloom
description: Unica and the bears prepare to rock out in order to help the Grand Magnolia Tree bloom.

title: Ava's Yard Sale
description: To help Ava overcome stage fright, Hedgehog takes Ava's violin into her own hands, while Oscar calls in for some reinforcements.

title: The Charm Offensive
description: After Ben gets too much publicity for his alien antics in Fort Knox, a jealous Gwen feels unappreciated and looks to ease her pain with ice cream, but once she is confronted by Charmcaster looking to avenge Michael Morningstar, Gwen must prove to herself she's a worthy member of Team Tennyson if they are to survive.

title: Dreamtime
description: After a series of reoccurring nightmares affect his sleep, Ben refuses to open up to Max and Gwen about what's bothering him, but once they realize Zombozo himself is behind it, Ben must accept Max and Gwen's help if they are going to put a stop to the terror.

title: Kevin's Big Score
description: Ben and Gwen are finally starting to trust Kevin when Kevin steals the Rustbucket and tries to swap it for some alien tech from Argit! Argit then steals the Rustbucket from Kevin and runs away. Ben and Gwen must learn to trust a flawed teammate as they help Kevin claim the important alien tech he is desperately after and face off with one of Ben's old foes, Vulkanus.

title: Undercover
description: Ben and company must rescue Cooper, a kid genius, from the DNAliens who are forcing him to help build a mysterious arch.

title: Freaky Gwen Ben
description: When Ben interferes with malicious magician Hex's quest for the earth-moving Titan Gloves at a swap meet, he inadvertently switches bodies with Gwen forcing him to walk a mile in her shoes and vice-versa!

title: Primus
description: In the middle of fighting a Techadon robot, Ben, Kevin, and Gwen are unexpectedly transported by the Omnitrix to an alien planet named Primus.

title: Spotted Bear Stretch
description: On the eve of the Spotted Bear Stretch, Oscar and his pajamas are stuck at Susie's place as unwelcome house guests.

title: Walking on the Ceiling
description: Apple's curiosity of what it would be like to walk upside down like a spider should be ignored and given no further thought. It is not.

title: Whale Spotting
description: In order to see a rare whale, Apple and Onion have to become members of an exclusive club, but one of them doesn't quite have the chops.

title: Roller Disco
description: Pete Puma hires The Looney Builders to build a roller disco for Looneyburg. Lola is new to roller skating, but doesn't want to take it slow and practice.

title: Store 23
description: While out looking for the elusive 23rd Mr. Smoothy's store with Blukic and Driba, Ben meets an alternate version of himself.

title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad Ben World Part 2
description: Ben and Dr. Psychobos become reluctant allies in a parallel-dimension maelstrom.

title: The Eater
description: It's Halloween and Apple's not feeling quite right. He takes Onion into the dark depths to find out why.

title: Unearthed
description: Ben and company need to return a baby monster to its parents before the DNAliens find it.

title: T.G.I.S
description: The Secret Saturdays come to Bellwood to investigate a rash of chupacabra attacks.

title: The Feels
description: While Max and Gwen revel in the holiday spirit of Winter Wonderland, Ben couldn't be more unamused and focused on the toys, but once the Weatherheads set their sights on Winter Wonderland as their next target, our hero must become one with his emotion if he is to save the town.

title: Hedgehog Werewolf
description: Hedgehog gets bit by a cute puppy and is starting to act strange.

title: Video Store
description: Clarence, Jeff, and Sumo visit their local video store to rent a movie, but discover it's all rented out! Each of them have a different idea of what tape to bring home, and must enlist the help of a tie breaker to figure it out.

title: The Set of Seven
description: Iyanu travels to the Riverlands and reconnects with Team Chosen as they search for the origin of a mysterious energy wave. Olori joins them to warn of a People of the Deep invasion, and Iyanu agrees to work with her despite past tensions.

title: Ghost the Boy
description: Oscar and Hedgehog befriend a ghost who can't remember who he is.

title: Buggin' the Buggs
description: Team Tennyson travel to the Chrysalen Institute for some hot yoga and good vibes, only to find that the Bugg Brothers are on vacation, too, but are the sneaky insectoids really on holiday, or just cooking up yet another silly, yet high stakes scheme?

title: Grudge Match
description: Ben and Kevin 11 are beamed up to a space ship where must learn to battle together in order to bring down a vicious alien fight promoter.

title: AbaracaDuncan
description: When a magic trick goes sideways, Duncan makes a great escape and Harold becomes the target of a Sorcerer Hunt!

title: Oh Brother, Warehouse Art Thou?/Flu the Coop
description: Oh, Brother, Warehouse Art Thou?: Baby Sylvester is overcome with angst because Granny's broken old chair, his favorite napping place, must be replaced by a new, unfamiliar piece of furniture. The other Baby Looney Tunes work together to help turn Sylvester's trepidation into enjoyment during their mammoth furniture-shopping adventure./Flu the Coop: Baby Bugs and Baby Daffy decide to team up and unlike the other Baby Looney Tunes, fake having received their annual flu shots at the local clinic. The joke's on them when they awaken on the day of Granny's big party unable to have fun because they both have the flu.

title: The Secret of the Omnitrix Part 1
description: In a battle with Animo, Ben in hero mode, doesn't listen to reason from Max and Gwen, and gets engulfed in a weird energy light. Little does Ben know that the "self destruct" function on the Omnitrix has just been initiated!

title: Sneeze Guard
description: Oscar and Hedgehog must work with the witches to cure Alice's camp-threatening illness.

title: Battle at Biggie Box
description: Ben and Billy Billions go head to head over a Sumo Slammer Set sold exclusively inside the world's largest shopping center, only to find six-year-old Simon Sez has gotten it first! A battle royal ensues inside a store that seemingly has everything except an easy to find exit.

title: Special Delivery
description: As payment for destroying his car, Mr. Bowman orders Ben to make deliveries for him without using the Omnitrix.  (Featuring Thunderpig, new Ben alien Toepick.)

title: Choosin' For a Bruisin'
description: Our campers get tested on how well they know each other. Correct answers could win them immunity, but incorrect answers drop them into a pool of hungry wolverines.

title: Tell-A-Photo/Born to Sing (song)/Move It!
description: Tell-A-Photo: As Granny assembles her photo album, the babies gather around to reminisce about all the happy times they've spent together./Move It!: Overhearing Granny making a call to Manny the Mover, Baby Bugs and Baby Lola jump to the conclusion they're all moving away from Granny's house.

title: Trouble Helix
description: Flashback episode: Young Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max visit Azmuth on Galvan Prime. There, they have their first encounter with Malware, a corrupted Mechamorph who's determined to make Azmuth cure him, by any means!

title: Back with a Vengeance
description: Ben's feeling cocky with the watch. He's unlocked its secret, and now can become any alien he wants, whenever he wants. That's the good news. The bad news is, after finding one another in the depths of space, Kevin 11 and Vilgax have teamed up and have returned to earth to destroy Ben and get the Omnitrix.

title: Dare Day
description: With Jeff on vacation, Sumo and Clarence egg each other on in a series of increasingly absurd and extreme dares. But will one of them put a stop to this dare day, before it goes too far?

title: Above and Beyond
description: The Plumber's Helpers are called upon by Grandpa Max to rescue him from an abandoned space station where he is being attacked by - Ben!

title: War of the Worlds Part 2
description: Ben and his team travel to the Highbreed home world to stop them once and for all.

title: Radio Silence
description: Oscar must get Hedgehog a special sandwich in order to save their friendship.

title: Gyranoid of the Future
description: Apple and Onion are dead set on riding Gyranoid of the Future, the craziest roller coaster at the carnival.

title: Slobbery
description: Burger's roommate is not only a problem for him, but for Apple and Onion who need Burger's help for something else.

title: Keep It Fresh
description: It's Apple's turn to buy this months' groceries again meaning that the risk of starvation is at hand.

title: Public Radio
description: After listening to a public radio broadcast during class, Clarence is inspired to record a radio interview of his own featuring his buddy Sumo. When Ms. Baker hears the charming interview, she calls in a favor and gets Clarence a spot on the actual Aberdale Public Radio! The search is on - to find the perfect interview subject for his big day.

title: The Prince and the Chosen One
description: When Bert unknowingly pulls a sword from a stone, he is suddenly appointed the leader of the Heroic Council of Heroes. And Prince Ivandoe is appointed…Bert's squire! Ivandoe struggles with this role reversal and decides to show everyone who the real hero is!
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Falafel's Fun Day
description: When Falafel decides to pack up and leave the city, Apple and Onion have to convince him to stay or they'll have to leave too.

title: Daffy Did It!/Foghorn's Talkin' in the Barnyard (song)/Pig Who Cried Woof
description: Daffy Did It!: Tweety blames Daffy for his mistake, and then has trouble living with the guilt of lying./The Pig Who Cried Wolf: Petunia fakes emergencies. But when a real one arises, no one believes her.

title: The Great Elf Invention Convention
description: Oscar, Max, and Hedgehog do a favor for Barb the elf in exchange for some chips.

title: Camp Fear
description: When a race of alien mushrooms takes over a summer camp, Ben discovers a whole new alien to battle the menace.

title: Task Force X
description: Tired of fighting low tier villains, the Titans seek out Amanda Waller so they can join Task Force X.

title: Ben 10,000
description: Ben gets sucked into the future by a grown up Gwen. His mission is to help the now all powerful and adult Ben 10,000 seemingly defeat the future versions of Dr. Animo and Vilgax. However, the real reason Ben has been brought to the future is to teach his adult self some humility and the fact he's lost touch with Max and has forgotten what's really important, family.

title: Oscar & Hedgehog's Melody
description: Susie holds the annual talent show that has the rest of the campers competing to win.

title: Shadow of a Doubt/John Jacob Jongle Elmer Fudd (song)/Christmas in July
description: Shadow of a Doubt: Tweety sheds some light on what a shadow is./Christmas in July: The babies pretend it's Christmas in hopes of getting Lola the stethoscope she wants.

title: Selfish Shellfish
description: Apple and Onion are faced with a philosophical question: Are they truly doing good deeds for the good of other people or is it all just for them?

title: The Big Story
description: When a mysterious meteor shower leaves behind an evil alien plant species, Ben 10 super-fan Jimmy steps up to save the day.

title: Captain Craboo
description: The Bears are reunited with their pet crab, Captain Craboo. But after an unfortunate run-in with Nom Nom, the Bears may lose their pet forever.

title: Jazz Hooves
description: Fosse Ferret hires The Looney Builders to build a stage for the kids' dance recital. Eggbert has stage fright, but Porky is determined to help him overcome it.

title: The Unnaturals
description: Ben learns that evil robots have replaced all the kids at the Little League World Series. And now they want to replace the President of the USA!

title: Halloween
description: Carrie takes Gumball, Darwin and Anais to a real haunted house party on Halloween!

title: Betsy and Ghost Chapter 1: Burps 'n Sighs
description: On the eve of Ramona's exile to Frozen Time, Susie tries to get rid of the sad memory of their relationship, but soon finds herself haunted by the past.

title: A Sumoful Mind
description: When Jeff realizes Sumo's new classes have been rubbing off on Sumo, he attempts to further foster this newfound intellectual Sumo! But will Clarence's lowbrow antics reverse Jeff's hard work?

title: Sticky Feelings
description: Vivie gets angry when David accidentally takes her winning turn in a playground game. Barney helps Vivie process her anger, so she can work through it and keep playing with her friends.

title: Cutting Corners
description: Ben approaches Geezer Bob about doing a little yard work to earn spending money, but when Ben goes Upgrade to transform the lawnmower into a super fast mowing machine, he accidentally draws the ire of Bob's gnome-neighbors, the tiny, terrifyingly tenacious Billy-Bob Goblins.

title: French Toasting
description: Lucy's suspicious behavior prompts Oscar and Hedgehog to investigate whether or not she's the kingpin of a secret society.

title: Molar Moles
description: Oscar's fib about his last baby tooth alerts the Molar Mole Fraud Squad, and Hedgehog jumps to his defense at a kooky mole trial.

title: Divided We Stand
description: While at the beach, Ben discovers a new hero, Ditto, and soon has the ability to create multiple Dittos at once. These multiple Dittos can't agree on anything and drive Gwen crazy. However when the chips are down, these Dittos come together as one fighting force in order to defeat Animo and his army of replicant Stinkflies.

title: The Prince and the Feather Fluffer-Upper
description: Prince Ivandoe and Bert reluctantly agree to bring Princess Syllabob of the Underwater Kingdom an all-powerful Trident for her Sweet Sixteenth birthday. However, it is currently in the possession of Ivandoe's great nemesis - Prince Svan - who has found another, less dignified, use for it. Ivandoe and Bert must risk all, entering the Swan Palace and avoiding the appalling Royal Family, in order to fulfill their promise to King Axalotyl, King of the Deep.
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: The Secret of the Omnitrix Part 2
description: In a battle with Animo, Ben in hero mode, doesn't listen to reason from Max and Gwen, and gets engulfed in a weird energy light. Little does Ben know that the "self destruct" function on the Omnitrix has just been initiated!

title: Filthy Rich
description: What does it take to be truly content? Whatever it takes, Apple and Onion are going to achieve it.

title: Scared Silly
description: When the Rust Bucket runs out of gas on a foggy East Coast road, Ben, Gwen and Max are forced to stay at a hotel being menaced by Creepy Carl, a local folklore expert, who may actually be a ghost!

title: Big Fat Alien Wedding
description: Ben and Gwen accompany Max to a wedding, which doesn't make Ben particularly happy, especially given the fact he has to wear a tux and learn how to dance. During the wedding it's revealed that the bride's parents are aliens while the groom's family are ex-Plumbers. It turns out the bride's parents are out to sabotage the wedding because of a long lasting feud with the Plumbers, and take action by demonstrating their destructive powers and causing deadly havoc. Ben, Max and Gwen enter the fray and not only save the day, but make sure the ceremony goes on as planned.

title: Yeti Confetti Chapter 3: The Sherbet Scoop
description: Lucy decides to tell a story during a Yeti cloud-making ceremony about a Yeti Elder she doesn't know.

title: Batdraft
description: Batman, Buff, and Ace put their new firefighter training to the test when a magical fire breaks out in Poison Ivy's fortress.

title: Don't Let the Bass Drop
description: Ben and Gwen are excited to attend an Earth Day EDM concert in Portland until the show is hijacked by the sound-manipulating baddy Lord Decibel who uses sound as a weapon to trash the planet.

title: Take Us Out to the Ballgame/Clues Encounters of the Tweety Kind
description: Take Us Out to the Ball Game: The Baby Looney Tunes experience their very first big stadium baseball game. Lola's favorite team's star batter gets her undivided attention until Lola's coaching affects the very outcome of the contest./Clues Encounters of the Tweety Kind: Tweety feels neglected when no one wants him on their museum scavenger hunt team. Using his innate sleuthing abilities and the help of a friendly museum guard, Tweety proves to be the best scavenger hunter of them all. Once Tweety wins the contest, everyone wants him on their team.

title: Puddle and the King Chapter 1: Honey Moondog
description: The King leaves Hedgehog and Oscar in charge of the kingdom while he and Puddle are away - their only duty is to carry out the Swan-Upping.

title: Microwave's Dance Club
description: DJ Saltfish and MC Ackee are in town for two nights only and Apple and Onion are determined to make the most of it and bust some moves on the dance floor.

title: Good Copy, Bad Copy
description: An alien doppelganger impersonates Ben and is out to destroy him with the power of his own Omnitrix.

title: Rules of Engagement
description: Princess Looma returns to claim Ben as her husband, and she's not going to let anyone stand in her way!  (Featuring Julie and Ship.)

title: Midnight Madness
description: When the Rustbucket breaks down outside the largest mall in the U.S., it seems Ben and Gwen will have the time of their lives in the mall. That is until they run into an evil hypnotist entertaining the crowd, who puts Ben under hypnosis, causing him to sleepwalk at night and help him steal things. And when the hypnotist discovers certain aliens are now helping him, he exploits them for his grand plan of hypnotizing hundreds of people so they'll be under his demented control forever. Ben must figure out how to break the spell he's under and stop this evil plan.

title: Heatwave
description: Apple and Onion try to spread cheer during a city-wide heatwave.

title: Clarence Loves Shoopy
description: When Clarence discovers that one of his neighbors is the grumpy school recess proctor Ms. Shoop - he gets a glimpse of her home life and decides the only things she's missing are some friends. Clarence sets out on a mission to match the cranky oddball Shoop with some new pals!

title: Icy Nights
description: Ice Bear rides his custom vacuum into the city. But when a gang of techies steal the vacuum, Ice Bear goes on a rescue mission that takes him through the underground world of the city.

title: Clarence the Movie
description: When Clarence starts to play around with his home video camera, he becomes increasingly drawn into the world of filmmaking. From talking toys, to real actors, to documentary subjects, Clarence is determined to find the right style to tell his story!

title: Apple & Onion's Booth
description: Apple and Onion must save their favorite booth at Pizza's Diner from a Texas oil tycoon.

title: What Are Little Girls Made Of?
description: Ben and Gwen learn Max's wife, Verdona, is an alien and Gwen's magic is actually inherited alien power from their grandma. After learning the truth, Gwen is forced to choose between keeping her life as she knows it and sacrificing all that she has to become a being of great power.

title: The Prince and the Doomy Loom of Destiny
description: Prince Ivandoe's heroic destiny is foretold by the Harpy sisters Agatha & Hildr. When their Loom foresees Ivandoe failing to find the Golden Feather, he decides to take his fate into his own hands!
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: The Return
description: Ghostfreak has returned! And he has brought a Mummy, Werewolf and Frankenstein like aliens with him to help him shroud the Earth in darkness.

title: The Prince and the Ducky Day
description: For Prince Ivandoe every day feels exactly the same…because it is!!! And he's the only one who can see it. Has it something to do with that mysterious Ducky and the so-called "Ducky Day"? Is Ivandoe stuck in this loop forever or will he once again get to "Quest on!"?
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: The Brave Little Tweety/Foghorn's Talkin' in the Barnyard (song)/Puddle Olympics
description: The Brave Little Tweety: Tweety takes a role in a play too seriously and begins to believe he's a real superhero./The Puddle Olympics: The kids take turns jumping over a puddle but Sylvester is afraid of the water.

title: Yeti Confetti Chapter 2: The Yum Whisperer
description: Lucy and a young yeti named Fife argue about the right way to raise a litter of baby yetis they found.

title: Spirit Balls
description: Susie and Ramona teach the witches how to make spirit balls.

title: Betsy and Ghost Chapter 2: Boo Jeans
description: It's Betsy's first night on Summer Camp Island, and she's looking forward to a cozy evening in with a nice cup of tea. But when Alice convinces her to participate in an initiation ritual, Betsy gets lost in the woods.

title: Growing Pains
description: During a stop at the superstore Shoppe, Ben and Gwen are transformed into babies by nanny-gone-nuts Nanny Nightmare, who will stop at nothing to reshape the world in the image of her daycare.

title: Monster Babies
description: Alice lures Oscar and his monster friends for a tea party, but only to turn the monsters into cute babies.

title: Gone Fishin'
description: When their fishing trip in Undertown takes a bizarre twist, Ben, Rook, and Grandpa Max, begin their search for a ship-bottling alien pirate who has captured Magister Patelliday. (Introducing Capt. Cork.)

title: The Treasure
description: Anais uncovers a secret that she's convinced will lead her to the Watterson's hidden family treasure.

title: Vendetta
description: Kevin finds his house ransacked and enlists Ben and Gwen's help to find out who did it and why. They soon cross paths with a deadly criminal.

title: Breakpoint
description: As Wildvine, Ben goes undercover with an alien crime ring and is tempted by their extreme lifestyle.

title: Paradox
description: A time experiment in the 1950's rips a bizarre monster from the past that threatens the future of Ben's time. It's a race against time as Ben, Gwen and Kevin team up with Paradox, a time-traveling hero, to face off against the unstoppable creature.

title: Wrong!/Win, Lose or Daffy
description: Wrong!: On an orchard outing, picking bushels of fresh apples for Granny's home-baked pies, the Baby Looney Tunes encounter Melissa, who is in a mood to tell everyone that her method of apple picking is the only way./Win, Lose or Daffy: A day playing miniature golf is fun for everyone but Baby Daffy, who believes he must beat everyone else at the game. At the end of the day, all but Daffy are having a good time regardless of how they scored.

title: Susie and her Sister Chapter 3: Mildred's Friend
description: Locked in a standoff with Susie over who will say sorry first, Mildred runs away to the woods and befriends a ghost. Will one of the McAllister sisters give in and apologize before the townsfolk run Mildred out of town?

title: Yeti Confetti Chapter 5: Where's the Confetti
description: When it doesn't snow on the final day of Yeti Confetti, a Yeti Elder blames Lucy. In order to prove she belongs Lucy tries to find a way to make it snow.

title: Ferekh
description: Apple and Onion are put in charge of Falafel's beloved rooster but it turns out that other parties have a vested interest in it too.

title: Of Predators and Prey Part 1
description: After a heated argument, Ben and Rook go their separate ways, giving Khyber the Huntsman his best chance to capture Ben! (Introducing Dr. Psychobos, new Nemetrix aliens Mucillator & Terroranchula; new Ben alien Ballweevil.)

title: Onionless
description: Onion needs to leave town so Apple has to survive the weekend alone while taking care of Onion's beloved plant.

title: Midnight Quittance
description: Ramona invites Hedgehog and Oscar to participate in a special holiday ritual.

title: Journey to the Bottom of the Crash Pit
description: The guys need to get the park video camera at the bottom of the crash pit.

title: The Prince and the Scrawny Squire
description: So close to Eagle Mountain, Ivandoe & Bert get hopelessly trapped by an avalanche. Their thoughts turn to how they first met and started on their Quest. But will they live long enough to see it through?
originalseriesname: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe

title: Breakfast Like Gene Kelly
description: Oscar attempts to make the breakfast of his dreams.

title: The Secret of the Omnitrix Part 3
description: In a battle with Animo, Ben in hero mode, doesn't listen to reason from Max and Gwen, and gets engulfed in a weird energy light. Little does Ben know that the "self destruct" function on the Omnitrix has just been initiated!

title: Hit 'Em Where They Live
description: Now that Ben's secret identity is out in the open, his old enemies team up to attack his family.

title: Spell Crushers
description: Hedgehog tries to get over a crush so she can regain her focus on magic.

title: Chad and the Marathon
description: When Chad realizes his lazy habits might be rubbing off on Clarence, he decides to participate in the Aberdale Marathon. However, the athletic Chad doesn't know the first thing about being a runner, and must enlist the help of Clarence to train!

title: Silly Time
description: When Mel doesn't want to stop making a funny sound, Barney and the kids go on an adventure to the Waterverse to meet a clingy hermit crab named Hermie. Hermie helps Mel realize that there's a proper time and a place for certain behaviors.

title: Light as a Feather
description: While Hedgehog braves her first witch coven sleepover, Oscar awaits a secret signal in case she needs to be rescued.

title: Monster Weather
description: Max takes the kids to a drought stricken Chicago to see his favorite golden oldie band perform at a huge music festival. Once there, our heroes cross paths with a deranged weatherman.

title: The Eye of the Beholder
description: Ship's former owner, Baz-L, has been captured on a distant planet while stealing gems and Ben, Julie and the crew set out to save him.

title: Don't Fear the Repo
description: Repo men, Octagon and Rhomboid Vreedle, have been hired to return Ship to the Upgrade who spawned him. But Ben, Kevin and Gwen have different plans.

title: The Frogs of War Part 1
description: The Incursean Armada, with the help of Dr. Psychobos, have invaded the Earth. (Reintroducing old Ben alien, BenMummy.)

title: The Nature of Things
description: While sightseeing at the Geyser Gulch National Park, the Tennyson trio uncover Steam Smythe's steam-powered generator and must shut it down before it overloads the power grid or, even worse, causes a massive earthquake that destroys the entire park!

title: Whatever Happened to Babsy Bunny?
description: Babs is drawn into the world of modeling by animal calendar photographer, Elmyra Duff, while Plucky grapples with a bad caricature.
